entry.title: THUOJ PA2 2-2-2 凸包2
entry.content:
题目描述 二维平面上给n个点，求凸包 输入输出 输入 输入文件为二进制格式存储。即所有数据连续存储，没有行的概念。 第一个为整数n，代表点的数量。 随后连续存储了2*n个整数，每两个数为每个点的坐标(xi, yi) 输出 每行表示凸包上一个点的坐标。 选择凸包上纵坐标最小的点作为第一个输出的点，按逆时针顺序依次输出所有凸包上的点。 注：只需输出凸包上位于顶点的点。 输入输出样例12345678910111213141516171819202122input: 111 09 310 67 117 04 117 78 18 121 65 5output:1 07 08 19 310 68 124 111 6 示意： 12345678910111213141516171819202122232425# Pythonimport numpy as npimport matplotlib.pyplot as pltn = 0pvec = []with open('./in.txt', 'r') as f: for i, line in enumerate(f.readlines()): if i == 0: n = int(line) else: pvec.append(np.array([int(line.split()[0]), int(line.split()[1])]))for p in pvec: plt.plot(p[0], p[1], '+')res = []with open('./out.txt', 'r') as f: for line in f.readlines(): res.append(np.array([int(line.split()[0]), int(line.split()[1])]))for i, p in enumerate(res): plt.plot(p[0], p[1], 'o') plt.text(p[0], p[1], '%d'%i)plt.show() 限制 5<=n<=1,500,000 每个点的横纵坐标为有符号整数，满足-2^25<=x,y<=2^25 工具 THUOJ提供了一个凸包可视化的工具convexhull.py 功能为：在一个二维平面上随机生成数据点并将求得的凸包可视化。 下载地址 提示一级提示 自己测试时，如果对读入二进制数据不熟悉，可以以文本的形式读取数据；提交到OJ时，参考如下代码修改读取数据的方式： 12345fread(&n, sizeof(int), 1, stdin);for (int i=0; i<n; i++) { fread(&p[i].x, sizeof(int), 1, stdin); fread(&p[i].y, sizeof(int), 1, stdin);} 输出请不要使用二进制方式输出，直接以人可读的方式输出结果即可。 若想用二进制数据进行测试，可以自己输出二进制数据到文件中。要注意由于不同的操作系统对于换行符格式并不统一，故自己生成二进制测试数据文件时，若使用命令行重定向的方式向二进制文件输出，可能会出现错误。可参考如下代码对生成的测试数据进行输出： 12freopen("test.in", "wb", stdout);fwrite(&testData, sizeof(int), 1, stdout); 凸包：http: aike.baidu.com\view\707209.htm 二级提示 数据特点：输入数据不像《凸包1》这题一样是随机的，这n个点经过特殊设计，凸包上的点较多。 适用算法：凸包上的点数量较多，使用JarvisMarch算法会超时。可以使用快速凸包算法，该算法复杂度为VlogV，其中V表示点的总数 思路 根据提示，使用快速凸包算法 本题输入方式和之前的不一样，先实现一般版本，再根据题目要求进行改进。 快速凸包 采用分治法，平均时间复杂度为$O(nlog(n))$，最坏时间复杂度为$O(n^2)$。 主要分为以下几步（参考wiki）： 找到具有最小和最大的x坐标的点 A 和 B 线 AB 将点集划分为两部分，用来之后的分而治之 在每一侧都找到距离 AB 最远的点，这些点和直线在两边分别形成了一个三角形 在三角形内部的点肯定不是凸包点 在三角形除了AB的两边重复以上两步 重复直到没有剩余的点，被选中的点即形成了凸包 伪代码12345678910111213141516171819ConvexHull = []QuickHull(S) # 从点集S中找到凸包 A, B = 最左侧点, 最右侧点 ConvexHull.append(A) ConvexHull.append(B) S1 = AB 右侧的点 S2 = BA 右侧的点 FindHull(S1, A, B) FindHull(S2, B, A)FindHull(Sk, P, Q) # 在点集Sk中找到在凸包上的点 if Sk.size == 0: return C = PQ 右侧最远的点 ConvexHull.append(C) S1 = PC 右侧的点集 S2 = CQ 右侧的点集 FindHull(S1, P, C) FindHull(S2, C, Q)Output = ConvexHull 计算点到直线的距离 Python 实现中的findR(Sk, P, Q)要求找到Sk中距离PQ最远的点，需要计算点到直线的距离 参考文献 取点 $O$， $\overrightarrow{a} = \overrightarrow{PO}$ $\overrightarrow{b} = \overrightarrow{PQ}$ $$\overrightarrow{c} =  rac{\overrightarrow{a} \cdot \overrightarrow{b}}{|\overrightarrow{b}|} \cdot  rac{\overrightarrow{b}}{|\overrightarrow{b}|} =  rac{\overrightarrow{a} \cdot \overrightarrow{b}}{|\overrightarrow{b}|^2} \cdot \overrightarrow{b}$$ $$|\overrightarrow{e}| = |\overrightarrow{a} - \overrightarrow{c}|$$ 逆时针输出点集 参考资料 首先找到点集的重心 $O$，然后有两种方法可以解决问题 作平行于x轴的射线 $OX$，根据 $OP_i$ 与 $OX$ 之间的夹角大小关系来确定一个点是否在另一个点的逆时针方向。 根据两向量叉积正负，来确定点的顺逆时针关系 此处采用方法2 Python 实现 numpy as npimport randomimport operatorimport matplotlib.pyplot as pltn = random.randrange(20, 40)points = [(random.randrange(-100, 100), random.randrange(-100, 100)) for _ in range(n)]points = np.array(points, dtype=np.int64)def findL(S): """ 找到S中最左点，有多个时选最下方的 """ index_list = np.where(S[:,0]==np.min(S[:,0])) # 找到横坐标最小值对应的下标 min_candidate = S[index_list] if(len(min_candidate) == 1): return min_candidate[0] # 有多个最小值时选纵坐标最小的 min_index = np.where(min_candidate[:,1]==np.min(min_candidate[:,1])) min_point = min_candidate[min_index] return min_point[0]def findR(S): """ 找到S中最右点，有多个时选最上方的 """ index_list = np.where(S[:,0]==np.max(S[:,0])) # 找到横坐标最大值对应的下标 max_candidate = S[index_list] if(len(max_candidate) == 1): return max_candidate[0] # 有多个最大值时选纵坐标最大的 max_index = np.where(max_candidate[:,1]==np.max(max_candidate[:,1])) max_point = max_candidate[max_index] return max_point[0]def findLR(S): """ 返回S中最左侧点和最右侧点 """ # 只需找到S中横坐标最小和最大者即可 l_point = findL(S) r_point = findR(S) return l_point, r_pointdef findRset(S, A, B): """ 返回S中AB右侧的点集 取S中一点O，OA X OB < 0 => O 在 AB 右侧 """ RS = [] for p in S: x1 = A[0] - p[0] y1 = A[1] - p[1] x2 = B[0] - p[0] y2 = B[1] - p[1] if x1*y2 - x2*y1 < 0: RS.append(p) return RSdef distance(O, P, Q): """ 求O到直线PQ的距离 """ vec_a = np.array([O[0]-P[0], O[1]-P[1]]) vec_b = np.array([Q[0]-P[0], Q[1]-P[1]]) vec_c = float(vec_a.dot(vec_b)) / vec_b.dot(vec_b) vec_c = vec_b.dot(vec_c) dist = np.sqrt((vec_a-vec_c).dot(vec_a-vec_c)) return distdef findRst(Sk, P, Q): """ 返回Sk中PQ的右侧最右方的点 """ maxD = distance(Sk[0], P, Q) maxP = Sk[0] for i, O in enumerate(Sk): if i == 0: continue curD = distance(O, P, Q) if curD > maxD: maxP = O maxD = curD return maxPConvexHull = []def QuickHull(S): A, B = findLR(S) ConvexHull.append(A) ConvexHull.append(B) S1 = findRset(S, A, B) S2 = findRset(S, B, A) FindHull(S1, A, B) FindHull(S2, B, A)def FindHull(Sk, P, Q): if len(Sk) == 0: return C = findRst(Sk, P, Q) ConvexHull.append(C) S1 = findRset(Sk, P, C) S2 = findRset(Sk, C, Q) FindHull(S1, P, C) FindHull(S2, C, Q)QuickHull(S)for p in S: plt.plot(p[0], p[1], '+')for p in ConvexHull: plt.plot(p[0], p[1], 'o')plt.show()ctr = np.array([0,0])for p in ConvexHull: ctr[0] += p[0] ctr[1] += p[1]ctr[0] /= len(ConvexHull)ctr[1] /= len(ConvexHull)def comp(A, B, ctr): """ A > B: A在B的逆时针方向 A < B: A在B的顺时针方向 A = B: A和B共线 """ vec0 = np.array([A[0]-ctr[0], A[1]-ctr[1]]) vec1 = np.array([B[0]-ctr[0], B[1]-ctr[1]]) det = vec0[0]*vec1[1] - vec0[1]*vec1[0] if det > 0: return -1 if det < 0: return 1 return 0def qsortClock(arr): if len(arr) <= 1: return arr pivot = arr[len(arr)//2] left = [x for x in arr if comp(pivot, x, ctr)>0] middle = [x for x in arr if comp(pivot, x, ctr)==0] right = [x for x in arr if comp(x, pivot, ctr)>0] return qsortClock(left)+middle+qsortClock(right)res = qsortClock(ConvexHull)def plot_r(res): for i, p in enumerate(res): plt.plot(p[0], p[1], '+', markersize=i+1) plt.title('counter-clockwise convexhull points') plt.show()plot_r(res)start = 0for i, p in enumerate(res): if i == 0: continue if p[1] < res[start][1]: start = i if p[1] == res[start][1] and p[0] < res[start][0]: start = ires0 = res[start:] + res[:start]plot_r(res0) 结果如下： 逆时针输出凸包点 以最低点作为起始点，逆时针输出凸包点 初步实现 C++#include<iostream>#include<cmath>#include<cstdlib>#define MAXSIZE 1500000*2*4 + 5using namespace std;class Point{public: int x, y; Point(int a, int b){ x = a; y = b; }};class Vector{ int* a; int _size; int maxsize;public: Vector(int n=4){_size = 0; maxsize = n; a = new int[maxsize];} void expand(){ if(_size > (maxsize >> 1)) { int* b = a; a = new int[maxsize<<=1]; for(int i = 0; i < _size; i++) a[i]=b[i]; delete[] b; } } void push_back(int index){ expand(); a[_size++] = index; } int size(){ return _size;} double dot(Vector vec_b){ if(_size == vec_b.size() && _size == 2) return (double)a[0]*vec_b[0] + (double)a[1]*vec_b[1]; } int& operator[](int i){ if(i >= _size) return a[0]; return a[i]; } Vector operator-(Vector& v){ Vector r; r.push_back(a[0]-v[0]); r.push_back(a[1]-v[1]); return r; }};class CHull{public: Point** pvec; double ctr0, ctr1; Vector res; int _size; int start; CHull(int n){ pvec = new Point*[n]; _size = n; } void QuickHull(){ Vector AB = findLR(); res.push_back(AB[0]); res.push_back(AB[1]); Vector S1 = findRset(AB[0], AB[1]); Vector S2 = findRset(AB[1], AB[0]); FindHull(S1, AB[0], AB[1]); FindHull(S2, AB[1], AB[0]); } void FindHull(Vector Sk, int P, int Q){ if(Sk.size() == 0) return; int C = findRst(Sk, P, Q); res.push_back(C); Vector S1 = findRset(Sk, P, C); Vector S2 = findRset(Sk, C, Q); FindHull(S1, P, C); FindHull(S2, C, Q); } Vector findLR(){ // 找最左点 int L = 0; int R = 0; for(int i = 1; i < _size; i++){ if(pvec[i]->x < pvec[L]->x || pvec[i]->x == pvec[L]->x && pvec[i]->y < pvec[L]->y) L = i; if(pvec[i]->x > pvec[R]->x || pvec[i]->x == pvec[R]->x && pvec[i]->y > pvec[R]->y) R = i; } Vector r; r.push_back(L); r.push_back(R); return r; } Vector findRset(int A, int B){ // 返回AB右侧的点集 Vector RS; for(int i = 0; i < _size; i++){ int x1 = pvec[A]->x - pvec[i]->x; int y1 = pvec[A]->y - pvec[i]->y; int x2 = pvec[B]->x - pvec[i]->x; int y2 = pvec[B]->y - pvec[i]->y; if((long long)x1*y2-(long long)x2*y1 < 0) RS.push_back(i); } return RS; } Vector findRset(Vector Sk, int A, int B){ // 返回Sk中AB右侧的点集 Vector RS; for(int i = 0; i < Sk.size(); i++){ int x1 = pvec[A]->x - pvec[Sk[i]]->x; int y1 = pvec[A]->y - pvec[Sk[i]]->y; int x2 = pvec[B]->x - pvec[Sk[i]]->x; int y2 = pvec[B]->y - pvec[Sk[i]]->y; if((long long)x1*y2-(long long)x2*y1 < 0) RS.push_back(Sk[i]); } return RS; } double distance(int O, int P, int Q){ Vector vec_a, vec_b; vec_a.push_back(pvec[O]->x-pvec[P]->x); vec_a.push_back(pvec[O]->y-pvec[P]->y); vec_b.push_back(pvec[Q]->x-pvec[P]->x); vec_b.push_back(pvec[Q]->y-pvec[P]->y); double c = vec_a.dot(vec_b) / vec_b.dot(vec_b); double c0 = c*vec_b[0]; double c1 = c*vec_b[1]; return sqrt((vec_a[0]-c0)*(vec_a[0]-c0) + (vec_a[1]-c1)*(vec_a[1]-c1)); } int findRst(Vector Sk, int P, int Q){ // 找到Sk中PQ右侧最右的点 double maxD = distance(Sk[0], P, Q); int maxP = Sk[0]; for(int i = 1; i < Sk.size(); i++){ double curD = distance(Sk[i], P, Q); if(curD > maxD){ maxP = Sk[i]; maxD = curD; } } return maxP; } void swap(int a, int b){ int tmp = res[a]; res[a] = res[b]; res[b] = tmp; } void clock_start(){ ctr0 = ctr1 = 0; for(int i = 0; i < res.size(); i++){ ctr0 += pvec[res[i]]->x; ctr1 += pvec[res[i]]->y; } ctr0 /= res.size(); ctr1 /= res.size(); qsortClock(0, res.size()); start = 0; for(int i = 1; i < res.size(); i++){ if(pvec[res[i]]->y < pvec[res[start]]->y || pvec[res[i]]->y == pvec[res[start]]->y && pvec[res[i]]->x < pvec[res[start]]->x) start = i; } for(int i = start; i < res.size(); i++) printf("%d %d
", pvec[res[i]]->x, pvec[res[i]]->y); for(int i = 0; i < start; i++) printf("%d %d
", pvec[res[i]]->x, pvec[res[i]]->y); } int comp(int A, int B){ // A > B 时 A在B的逆时针方向 double vec00, vec01, vec10, vec11, det; vec00 = pvec[A]->x-ctr0; vec01 = pvec[A]->y-ctr1; vec10 = pvec[B]->x-ctr0; vec11 = pvec[B]->y-ctr1; det = vec00*vec11 - vec01*vec10; if(det > 0) return -1; if(det < 0) return 1; return 0; } int partition(int lo, int hi){ int index = rand()%(hi-lo) + lo; swap(lo, index); int i, j; i = lo; j = lo+1; for(; j < hi;){ if(comp(res[lo], res[j]) > 0) { i++; swap(i, j); j++; } else j++; } swap(i, lo); return i; } void qsortClock(int lo, int hi){ // [lo, hi) if(lo>=hi-1) return; int pivot = partition(lo, hi); qsortClock(lo, pivot); qsortClock(pivot+1, hi); }};int main(){ int n; setvbuf(stdin, new char[MAXSIZE], _IOFBF, MAXSIZE); setvbuf(stdout, new char[MAXSIZE], _IOFBF, MAXSIZE); scanf("%d", &n); CHull ch(n); for(int i = 0; i < n; i++){ int x, y; scanf("%d%d", &x, &y); ch.pvec[i] = new Point(x, y); } ch.QuickHull(); ch.clock_start(); return 0;} 为适应二进制文件读入，将scanf()处改为如下代码： 1234567fread(&n, sizeof(int), 1, stdin);for (int i=0; i<n; i++) { int x, y; fread(&x, sizeof(int), 1, stdin); fread(&y, sizeof(int), 1, stdin); ch.pvec[i] = new Point(x, y);} 结果是20个测试用例只AC了5个…7个MLE,8个WA 改进 解除了一些不必要的封装 由于OJ中没有<vector> <algorithm>等头文件，造了一个vector的小轮子，尽可能造得精致一些。 之所以前一个只AC了5个，是因为算点到直线的距离时其中有一步在int*int时发生了溢出。 为了能将vector<Point> p当作全局变量使用，在main之外进行了声明，在读取n值后调用resize分配空间。 在本地对拍测试全部通过。 #include<iostream>#include<cmath>#include<cstdlib>//#include<vector>//#include<ctime>#define MAXSIZE 1500000*2*4 + 5using namespace std;class Point{public: int x, y; Point(int a=0, int b=0){ x = a; y = b; }};template<class T>class vector{public: T* _a; int _size; int _maxsize; vector(int n=4){ _a = new T[n]; _size = 0; _maxsize = n; } void expand(){ if(_size > (_maxsize>>1)) { T* _b = _a; _a = new T[_maxsize <<= 1]; for(int i = 0; i < _size; i++) _a[i] = _b[i]; delete[] _b; } } void push_back(T x){ expand(); _a[_size++] = x; } int size(){ return _size; } void resize(int n){ T* _b = _a; _a = new T[n]; _size = _maxsize = n; delete[] _b;// _a = new T[n];// _size = _maxsize = n; } T& operator[](int i){ if(i > _size) return _a[i]; return _a[i]; }};vector<Point> p;vector<int> res; // 储存最终结果点（只储存相应的下标） double ctr0, ctr1;vector<int> findRset(int A, int B){ // 返回AB右侧的点集 vector<int> RS; for(int i = 0; i < p.size(); i++){ int x1 = p[A].x - p[i].x; int y1 = p[A].y - p[i].y; int x2 = p[B].x - p[i].x; int y2 = p[B].y - p[i].y; if((long long)x1*y2-(long long)x2*y1 < 0) RS.push_back(i); } return RS;}vector<int> findRset(vector<int> Sk, int A, int B){ // 返回Sk中AB右侧的点集 vector<int> RS; for(int i = 0; i < Sk.size(); i++){ int x1 = p[A].x - p[Sk[i]].x; int y1 = p[A].y - p[Sk[i]].y; int x2 = p[B].x - p[Sk[i]].x; int y2 = p[B].y - p[Sk[i]].y; if((long long)x1*y2-(long long)x2*y1 < 0) RS.push_back(Sk[i]); } return RS;}double distance(int O, int P, int Q){ int a0 = p[O].x-p[P].x; int a1 = p[O].y-p[P].y; int b0 = p[Q].x-p[P].x; int b1 = p[Q].y-p[P].y; double c = ((double)a0*b0 + (double)a1*b1) / ((double)b0*b0+(double)b1*b1); double c0 = c*b0; double c1 = c*b1; return sqrt((a0-c0)*(a0-c0) + (a1-c1)*(a1-c1));}int findRst(vector<int> Sk, int P, int Q){ // 找到Sk中PQ右侧最右的点 double maxD = distance(Sk[0], P, Q); int maxP = Sk[0]; for(int i = 1; i < Sk.size(); i++){ double curD = distance(Sk[i], P, Q); if(curD > maxD || curD == maxD && p[Sk[i]].x < p[maxP].x){ maxP = Sk[i]; maxD = curD; } } return maxP;}void FindHull(vector<int> Sk, int P, int Q){ if(Sk.size() == 0) return; int C = findRst(Sk, P, Q); // 找到PQ右侧最远点 res.push_back(C); vector<int> S1 = findRset(Sk, P, C); vector<int> S2 = findRset(Sk, C, Q); FindHull(S1, P, C); FindHull(S2, C, Q);}void QuickHull(){ int A = 0; // 最左点的下标 int B = 0; // 最右点的下标 for(int i = 1; i < p.size(); i++){ if(p[i].x < p[A].x || p[i].x == p[A].x && p[i].y < p[A].y) A = i; if(p[i].x > p[B].x || p[i].x == p[B].x && p[i].y > p[B].y) B = i; } res.push_back(A); res.push_back(B); vector<int> S1 = findRset(A, B); vector<int> S2 = findRset(B, A); FindHull(S1, A, B); FindHull(S2, B, A);}int comp(int A, int B){ // A > B 时 A在B的逆时针方向 double vec00, vec01, vec10, vec11, det; vec00 = p[A].x-ctr0; vec01 = p[A].y-ctr1; vec10 = p[B].x-ctr0; vec11 = p[B].y-ctr1; det = vec00*vec11 - vec01*vec10; if(det > 0) return -1; if(det < 0) return 1; return 0;}int partition(int lo, int hi){ int index = rand()%(hi-lo) + lo; swap(res[lo], res[index]); int i, j; i = lo; j = lo+1; for(; j < hi;){ if(comp(res[lo], res[j]) > 0) { i++; swap(res[i], res[j]); j++; } else j++; } swap(res[i], res[lo]); return i;}void qsortClock(int lo, int hi){ // [lo, hi) if(lo>=hi-1) return; int pivot = partition(lo, hi); qsortClock(lo, pivot); qsortClock(pivot+1, hi);}void clock_start0(){ ctr0 = ctr1 = 0; for(int i = 0; i < res.size(); i++){ ctr0 += p[res[i]].x; ctr1 += p[res[i]].y; } ctr0 /= res.size(); ctr1 /= res.size(); qsortClock(0, res.size()); int start = 0; for(int i = 1; i < res.size(); i++){ if(p[res[i]].y < p[res[start]].y || p[res[i]].y == p[res[start]].y && p[res[i]].x < p[res[start]].x) start = i; } for(int i = start; i < res.size(); i++) printf("%d %d
", p[res[i]].x, p[res[i]].y); for(int i = 0; i < start; i++) printf("%d %d
", p[res[i]].x, p[res[i]].y);}int main(){ int n; setvbuf(stdin, new char[MAXSIZE], _IOFBF, MAXSIZE); setvbuf(stdout, new char[MAXSIZE], _IOFBF, MAXSIZE); // 过OJ时解注下行// fread(&n, sizeof(int), 1, stdin); scanf("%d", &n); p.resize(n); // 过OJ时解注以下// for (int i=0; i<n; i++) {// int x, y;// fread(&p[i].x, sizeof(int), 1, stdin);// fread(&p[i].y, sizeof(int), 1, stdin);// } for(int i = 0; i < n; i++){ int x, y; scanf("%d%d", &p[i].x, &p[i].y); } QuickHull(); clock_start0(); return 0;}

entry.title: THUOJ PA2 2-1 Train
entry.content: 题目描述 如图，一列车可以从A到S，再从S到B，也可以直接到B，S中最多可以中转的车辆数为m。某列车编号车厢依次为{a1,a2,…,an}，问这些车厢能否以{1,2,…,n}的次序，重新排列后从B端驶出。 输入输出 输入： 第一行： n, m 第二行： 以空格分隔的n个整数，保证为{1,2,…,n}的一个排列，表示待判断可行性的驶入序列{a1,a2,…,an}。 输出： 若不可行，输出No 若可行，输出步骤数最少的操作方式。 输入输出样例123456789101112131415input:5 21 2 3 5 4output: # I: A->S1 P # O: S->B2 P # P: A->B3 P5 I4 P5 Oinput:5 51 2 4 5 3output:No 限制 1<=n<=100,000 0<=m<=100,000 思路 考察的是栈混洗，只不过反了一下 直觉的思路是模拟 实现1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132333435363738394041424344454647484950515253545556575859606162636465666768697071727374757677787980818283848586#include<iostream>#define MAXSIZE 100000*4 + 5using namespace std;class Stack{public: int *s; int size, top; Stack(int n){ s = new int[n]; size = n; top = 0; } ~Stack(){delete[] s;} bool push(int k){ if(top == size) return false; s[top++] = k; return true; } int pop(){ if(!top) return 0; return s[--top]; } int get_top(){ if(!top) return 0; return s[top-1]; } bool empty(){ return !top; }};class List{public: int num; char op; List* next; List(int n, char o){ num = n; op = o; next = NULL; } void append(int n, char o){ List* l = new List(n, o); this->next = l; }};int main(){ int n, m; setvbuf(stdin, new char[MAXSIZE], _IOFBF, MAXSIZE); setvbuf(stdout, new char[MAXSIZE], _IOFBF, MAXSIZE); scanf("%d%d", &n, &m); Stack s(m); List* head = new List(0, 'O'); List* p = head; bool flag = true; int* a = new int[n]; for(int i = 0; i < n; i++) scanf("%d", &a[i]); for(int i = 1, j = 0; i <= n; i++){ if(!s.empty() && s.get_top() == i){ p->append(s.pop(), 'O'); p = p->next; continue; } while(j < n && a[j] != i){ if(!s.push(a[j])){ flag = false; break; } p->append(a[j], 'I'); p = p->next; j++; } if(!flag) break; if(j == n) { flag = false; break; } if(j < n && a[j] == i){ p->append(a[j], 'P'); p = p->next; j++; } } if(!flag) printf("No\n"); else{ p = head->next; while(p != NULL){ printf("%d %c\n", p->num, p->op); p = p->next; } } return 0;}

entry.title: THUOJ PA1 1-4 Alarm
entry.content: 题目描述 如图，图中的线为红外线，所有红外线不相交。 n个发射器和n个接收器将平面分为n+1个区域，从左到右记为0,1…n 判断给定的点在哪个区域上。若正好在红外线上，则认为处于右边的区域。 输入输出 输入 第一行：n m 以下n行：每行a b，表示发射器在(a,0)，接收器在(0,b)，每行a,b都比前一行大 以下m行：每行x y，表示求(x,y)所在的区域 输出 m行，每行一个数，代表该点所在区域 输入输出样例1234567891011input:4 21 13 24 46 51 34 1output:33 限制 1<=n<=200,000 1<=m<=200,000 1<={a,b,x,y}<2^31 提示 可以用向量积判断点与直线的位置关系 http://www.cnblogs.com/bfshm/articles/3620500.html 普通的遍历搜索是不能满足时间要求的，考虑使用二分查找等方法。 一些中间结果（例如向量积做乘法后的中间结果）可能会超出 int 范围，参考编程作业说明“附：一些常见编程错误”节。 编程作业说明 附：一些常见编程错误 :计算溢出。错误示例：int a = 1000000, b = 1000000;long long c = a * b;程序会先在 int 范围内计算 a b，最后把溢出后的结果赋值给 c。正确写法是 `c = (long long)a (long long)b`。 思路 根据两个点建立起直线的方程，然后根据向量积判断点和直线的位置关系，找到该点在哪两条线之间，从而判断在哪个区域 关键在于怎么快速地判断在哪两条线之间，根据提示，使用二分查找（二分查找的灵活应用还是挺多的，比如2017THU机试） 点和直线的位置关系的判断方法 利用矢量叉积： $\boldsymbol{P} = (x_1, y_1)$, $\boldsymbol{Q} = (x_2, y_2)$, $\boldsymbol{P} \times \boldsymbol{Q} = x_1y_2 - x_2y_1$ 若$\boldsymbol{P} \times \boldsymbol{Q} > 0$，则$\boldsymbol{P}$在$\boldsymbol{Q}$的顺时针方向。 若$\boldsymbol{P} \times \boldsymbol{Q} < 0$，则$\boldsymbol{P}$在$\boldsymbol{Q}$的逆时针方向。 若$\boldsymbol{P} \times \boldsymbol{Q} = 0$，则$\boldsymbol{P}$与$\boldsymbol{Q}$共线。 由此，设点为$O$，$x$轴上的点为$A$，$y$轴上的点为$B$，令： $\boldsymbol{P} = \overrightarrow{OA}$ $\boldsymbol{Q} = \overrightarrow{OB}$ 从而有： 令$s = \boldsymbol{P} \times \boldsymbol{Q}$ $s>0 \Rightarrow$ 点在线的左侧 $s<0 \Rightarrow$ 点在线的右侧 实现1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132333435363738394041424344454647484950515253545556#include<iostream>#define MAXSIZE 1<<20using namespace std;class Line {public: int a, b; Line(int x, int y) { a = x; b = y; }};class Point { int x, y;public: Point(int a, int b) { x = a; y = b; } int check(Line** lvec, int lo, int hi) { while (lo < hi) { int mi = lo + (hi - lo) / 2; long long x1 = lvec[mi]->a - x; long long y1 = -y; long long x2 = -x; long long y2 = lvec[mi]->b - y; long long s = x1 * y2 - x2 * y1; if (s == 0) return mi + 1; if (s > 0) // 点在该线的左侧 hi = mi; // return check(lvec, lo, mi); if (s < 0) lo = mi + 1; // return check(lvec, mi+1, hi); } return lo; }};int main() { int n, m; setvbuf(stdin, new char[MAXSIZE], _IOFBF, MAXSIZE); setvbuf(stdout, new char[MAXSIZE], _IOFBF, MAXSIZE); scanf("%d%d", &n, &m); Line** lvec = new Line*[n]; // 指针数组 Point** pvec = new Point*[m]; for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) { int a, b; scanf("%d%d", &a, &b); lvec[i] = new Line(a, b); } for (int i = 0; i < m; i++) { int x, y; scanf("%d%d", &x, &y); pvec[i] = new Point(x, y); } for (int i = 0; i < m; i++) { int area = pvec[i]->check(lvec, 0, n); // [0, n) printf("%d\n", area); } return 0;}

entry.title: THUOJ-PA1-1-3-2-Super Interview
entry.content: 问题描述 选出n个人进行面试，每个应聘者被分配了一个整数ID。要注意人数非常多（数据量很大） 根据以下规则决定面试顺序 来一张圆桌，第一个到的人随意坐 之后每一个到的人从前一个人出发逆时针走过m个人（前一个人算第一个），然后紧邻第m个人的右侧就座。所有人入座后，从最后到达者出发，绕圆桌顺时针面试。 请确定面试顺序。 输入输出 输入： 第一行：n m 第二行：n个整数，表示先后到达的人的ID 输出： 共一行：以空格分隔的n个整数，分别是按顺序面试的ID 测试用例12345input:5 36 7 8 9 10 output:10 6 8 9 7 限制 1<=n<=10^6 1<=n*m<=10^7 输入的ID保证在int类型的范围内 提示一级提示 循环链表 二级提示 因为找座位按逆时针方向，面试按顺时针发现，所以建议使用双向循环链表。 往链表中插入元素时，要小心地修改前驱指针和后继指针。 一次性new n个节点，比分n次每次new一个节点快一些。 思路 用循环链表进行模拟 很像约瑟夫问题 实现 最初版本，可通过所有测试用例，worst case 是19，time:712，memory:51524 关键在于实现一个双向链表，难度不大。 排行榜最好情况是 time:128 memory:24152 加上两行setvbuf(stdin, new char[MAXSIZE], _IOFBF, MAXSIZE); setvbuf(stdout, new char[MAXSIZE], _IOFBF, MAXSIZE);（MAXSIZE=4000000 + 5）之后，最坏测例19的时间是472，空间是59332。加快了一倍。 12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728293031323334353637383940#include<iostream>class dlist{public: int ID; dlist* pre; dlist* next; dlist(int n){ ID = n; pre = this; next = this; } void add_after(dlist* cur){ cur->pre = this; cur->next = this->next; this->next->pre = cur; this->next = cur; }};int main(){ int n, m; scanf("%d%d", &n, &m); dlist** pID = new dlist*[n]; // 一次性new n个意思是搞一个指针数组？ for(int i = 0; i < n; i++){ int ID; scanf("%d", &ID); pID[i] = new dlist(ID); } dlist* start = pID[0]; for(int i = 1; i < n; i++){ int count = m - 1; while(count--) start = start->next; start->add_after(pID[i]); start = start->next; } for(int i = 0; i < n; i++){ printf("%d ", start->ID); start = start->pre; } return 0;}

entry.title: THUOJ PA1 1-2 Company
entry.content:
问题描述 公司有n个员工，编号为1~n。 员工上班时登陆管理系统登记一个code，离开时进行注销。 管理人员随时想知道多少员工上班以及任一个员工登记的code。 输入输出 第一行是两个整数n,m。接下来是m行，每行是以下内容之一： I a c // Log In：员工 a 登录，code 为 c。若 a 已登录，则将 code 更新为 c O a // Log Out：编号为 a 的员工注销。若 a 未登录，则注销无效 C // Close：到下班时间，所有员工注销 N // Number：询问有多少员工正在上班 Q a // Query：询问员工 a 的 code（若未登录或已注销，视为 -1） 输入输出举例：12345678910111213input:10 8I 1 2I 1 4Q 1CI 2 4O 2Q 2Noutput:3 # 输出为所有答案之和//“Q 1” 答案是 4，“Q 2” 答案是 -1，“N” 答案是 0，所有答案之和为 3 限制 n <= 10,000,000 m <= 1,000,0001 <= a <= ncode 为 [0, 2^31) 的整数 提示一级提示 测试数据中，每种操作都可能频繁出现，或很少出现。因此，你的算法需要应对所有可能的情况。 答案会超出 int 范围，要注意各种数据类型可表示的范围，尤其是溢出问题。可选用 long long int 或 int64_t 等类型。注意各种数据类型的正确输入、输出方式。 Bitmap / 常数时间初始化的数组——讲义 02XA Bitmap: 习题解析 [2-34] 二级提示 避免频繁初始化整个数组。 可以借助Bitmap记录数组的各元素是否已被初始化。将一个（或所有）元素置为未初始化状态，实质上只需要打破“校验环”两个验证条件中的任何一个，考虑如何打破校验条件的复杂度最低。 另一种解题思路是，数组初始化 1 次后，记录改变了的元素，今后不再初始化整个数组，只初始化改变了的元素。 用 scanf(“%c”, …) 或 getchar() 读入一个字符时，可能会读到空格、制表符、回车符或换行符，尽量避免使用这个方法。使用 scanf(“%s”, …) 会自动过滤空白字符。 Windows 和 Linux 上换行符有 “
” 跟 “
” 的差别，你的程序最好有一定鲁棒性，能处理两种情况。 思路 先实现低效版，再思考改进。 低效版 先写一个低效版。其中通过while (isspace(op)) scanf("%c", &op);来滤去空格以及换行制表等符号。 算法低效之处主要在于close()函数，当下班时只能对所有的元素进行赋值-1，而不能仅仅只针对已上班的员工。其他的主要函数时间复杂度都是O(1). 总的时间复杂度为O(n)，空间复杂都为O(n) 除了9,10,19测试点超时，其余测试点均可以通过。 将此算法生成的执行文件作为对拍的标准程序。1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132333435363738394041424344454647484950515253545556575859606162636465// 低效版// std_company.cpp#include<iostream>#include<cstring>using namespace std;class Company { int num, N; long long int score; int* code;public: Company(int n) { N = n; code = new int[N + 1]; for (int i = 0; i < N + 1; i++) code[i] = -1; num = 0; score = 0; } ~Company() { delete[] code; } void log_in(int a, int c) { if (code[a] == -1) num++; code[a] = c; } void log_out(int a) { if (code[a] != -1) { code[a] = -1; num--; } } void close() { for (int i = 0; i < N + 1; i++) code[i] = -1; num = 0; } void number() { score += num; } void query(int a) { score += code[a]; } void show_ans() { printf("%lld
", score); }};int main() { int n, m; scanf("%d%d", &n, &m); Company mycp(n); while (m--) { char op; int a, c; scanf("%c", &op); while (isspace(op)) scanf("%c", &op); switch (op) { case 'I': scanf("%d%d", &a, &c); mycp.log_in(a, c); break; case 'O': scanf("%d", &a); mycp.log_out(a); break; case 'C': mycp.close(); break; case 'N': mycp.number(); break; case 'Q': scanf("%d", &a); mycp.query(a); break; default: break; } } mycp.show_ans(); return 0;} 思考改进 考虑加上习题解析[2-34]中bitmap的思路 采用同时支持set() clear()这两样操作的类，参考代码x2.9。 可以在O(1)时间隐式初始化（但是还有至少要有O(n)的分配内存的时间的） 查上班人数时还是沿用低效版的思路，用一个变量表示上班人数，log_in时加一，log_out时减一，都下班时清零。 仿照bitmap设置两个向量，F[]来记录[k]被标记的次序，向量T[]来记录依次被标记的值。 clear()时的改进：只需将top置零，时间复杂度O(1) 同时，code[]也不用全部初始化，只需每次修改code[F[k]]即可 如此，所有的操作时间复杂度都是O(1)1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132333435363738394041424344454647484950515253545556575859606162636465666768697071727374757677787980818283#include<iostream>#include<cstring>using namespace std;class Company { int num, N; long long int score; int* code; int* F; int* T; int top;protected: bool valid(int r) {return (0<=r)&&(r<top);} bool erased(int a) { return valid(F[a])&&!(T[F[a]]+1+a); // 删除时T[F[a]] = -1-a }public: Company(int n) { N = n; code = new int[N + 1]; F = new int[N + 1]; T = new int[N + 1]; top = 0; num = 0; score = 0; } ~Company() { delete[] code; delete[] F; delete[] T; } bool test(int a){ return valid(F[a]) && (a==T[F[a]]); } /* 登陆需要考虑： 1.从未登陆过 2.登陆过又再次登陆 3.登陆后进行注销后又再次登陆 */ void log_in(int a, int c) { if(!test(a)){ // 测试不对，说明注销过或者从未登陆 if(!erased(a)) // 从未登陆过 F[a] = top++; // 创建新的校验环 num++; // 登陆人数加一 T[F[a]] = a; // 若注销过则需恢复原校验环 } code[F[a]] = c; } void log_out(int a) { if(test(a)) { // 已登陆 T[F[a]] = -1-a; num--; // 登陆人数减一 } } void close() { top = 0; // 直接 top 置零，和低效版相比有所改进 num = 0; } void number() { score += num; } void query(int a) { if(test(a)) score += code[F[a]]; else score += -1; } void show_ans() { printf("%lld
", score); }};int main() { int n, m; scanf("%d%d", &n, &m); Company mycp(n); while (m--) { char op; int a, c; scanf("%c", &op); while (isspace(op)) scanf("%c", &op); switch (op) { case 'I': scanf("%d%d", &a, &c); mycp.log_in(a, c); break; case 'O': scanf("%d", &a); mycp.log_out(a); break; case 'C': mycp.close(); break; case 'N': mycp.number(); break; case 'Q': scanf("%d", &a); mycp.query(a); break; default: break; } } mycp.show_ans(); return 0;}

entry.title: THUOJ PA1 1-1 Team
entry.content: 问题描述 教练ABC从编号为1-n的队员中选队员，根据他们各自的喜好来进行排序 a,b,c三个数组表示三个教练对队员的喜好程度 每个数组为1-n的一个排列 喜好程度从高到低：a[0],a[1]…a[n-1] 分配规则： 从未分配队员中找A最喜欢的队员分之 然后再找B,C的 问队员k分给了哪个教练？ 12345678input:3 # 队员个数 n1 2 3 # 数组a1 2 3 # 数组b1 2 3 # 数组c3 # 队员 koutput:C # k 分给了 C 限制： 1 <= n <= 500,000 1 <= k <= n 工具还提供了一个对拍工具其中： gen.py 随机生成测试数据的程序。 main.exe 一个待验证的程序，正确性未知。 std.py 一个蛮力的python代码。 test.cmd 自我检测运行文件。做了一些整理，放github上了：https://github.com/WineChord/OJ-Auxiliary 提示 大体上，1 sec内，O(n)的算法可以通过 n = 10,000,000 规模的数据，O(nlogn) 通过 500,000 规模，O(n^2) 通过 5,000 规模。 本题等一些复杂度是 O(n) 的题目受限于 scanf(“%d”, …) 的读入速度，但又不希望通过读取二进制文件等不直观的方式增加同学们的负担。 “懒删除”策略：从序列中移除一个元素时，可以只标记它，下次读取时跳过它，而不需要将它后面的元素都向前挪一位。思考如何做标记，能在每个教练员选队员时，快速地知道该队员是否已被选走。 Tips:清零或赋值时，memset 比手动赋值快几倍。输入数据时，有时 scanf 比 cin 快一些。关于读写速度，请参考 Tutorial Collection #1 5.大数据(Big)。 思路 用一个数组s[n]来表示队员是否已被选走，被选走则为1，初始值为0。 用i,j,m来表示数组a,b,c正在处理的喜好下标。 然后按顺序访问a,b,c三个数组，每次每个数组能够成功标记一个队员 12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728# Python# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-n = int(input())orders = [[],[],[]]for i in range(3): orders[i] = [int(x) for x in input().split()][a,b,c] = ordersk = int(input())s = [0 for _ in range(n+1)]i = j = m = 0def check(a, i, num): if i > n-1: return i if s[a[i]] == 0: s[a[i]] = num else: while i <= n-1 and s[a[i]] != 0: i += 1 if i <= n-1: s[a[i]] = num i += 1 return ifor _ in range(n): i = check(a, i, 1); j = check(b, j, 2); m = check(c, m, 3);print('ABC'[s[k]-1]) 对应C++ (直译版) test result worst case time memory 10 224 22664 123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142#include<cstdio>int a[1<<19] = {0};int b[1<<19] = {0};int c[1<<19] = {0};int s[1<<19] = {0};int n;int check(int* a, int& i, int num){ if(i > n-1) return i; if(!s[a[i]]) s[a[i]] = num; else{ while(i<=n-1 && s[a[i]]!=0) i++; if(i <= n-1) s[a[i]] = num; } i++; return i;}int main(){ setvbuf(stdin, new char[1<<20], _IOFBF, 1<<20); setvbuf(stdout, new char[1<<20], _IOFBF, 1<<20); int k, n0; scanf("%d", &n); n0 = n; while(n0--) scanf("%d", &a[n-n0-1]); n0 = n; while(n0--) scanf("%d", &b[n-n0-1]); n0 = n; while(n0--) scanf("%d", &c[n-n0-1]); n0 = n; scanf("%d", &k); int i, j, m; i = j = m = 0; while(n0--){ i = check(a, i, 1); j = check(b, j, 2); m = check(c, m, 3); } char ans; switch(s[k]){ case 1: ans = 'A';break; case 2: ans = 'B';break; case 3: ans = 'C';break; default: break; } printf("%c\n", ans); return 0;} 稍微改进了一下空间利用效率，开的空间更加节省了，看排行榜有的时间可以再短些，我猜是scanf那边还可以再优化一下？后来加上了memset好像没有很大的效果。 123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839#include<cstdio>#define MAXLEN 500000+1int abc[3][MAXLEN];int s[MAXLEN] = {0};int n;int check(int& i, int num){ if(i > n-1) return i; if(!s[abc[num-1][i]]) s[abc[num-1][i]] = num; else{ while(i<=n-1 && s[abc[num-1][i]]!=0) i++; if(i <= n-1) s[abc[num-1][i]] = num; } i++; return i;}int main(){ setvbuf(stdin, new char[MAXLEN], _IOFBF, MAXLEN); setvbuf(stdout, new char[MAXLEN], _IOFBF, MAXLEN); int k, n0; scanf("%d", &n); for(int i = 0; i < 3; i++) for(int j = 0; j < n; j++) scanf("%d", &abc[i][j]); scanf("%d", &k); int i, j, m; i = j = m = 0; n0 = n; while(n0--){ check(i, 1); check(j, 2); check(m, 3); } char ans; switch(s[k]){ case 1: ans = 'A';break; case 2: ans = 'B';break; case 3: ans = 'C';break; default: break; } printf("%c\n", ans); return 0;}

entry.title: 博客Win10本地配置+添加搜索和Disqus
entry.content: 大概2019.1.10左右的时候在电脑的SSD上装了一个Win10（顿时觉得这孩子寿命又长了两年）。需要重新配置一下本地运行blog的环境，故记录之。 安装Node.jsNode.js 安装githttp://git-scm.com/download/ 安装Hexo在blog目录下右键：’Git Bash here’1$ npm install -g hexo-cli PS:执行上一步时出现了一个小插曲，显示了如下错误：1234567891011npm ERR! code ECONNRESETnpm ERR! errno ECONNRESETnpm ERR! network request to https://registry.npmjs.org/escape-string-regexp failed, reason: Client network socket disconnected before secure TLS connection was establishednpm ERR! network This is a problem related to network connectivity.npm ERR! network In most cases you are behind a proxy or have bad network settings.npm ERR! networknpm ERR! network If you are behind a proxy, please make sure that thenpm ERR! network 'proxy' config is set properly. See: 'npm help config'npm ERR! A complete log of this run can be found in:npm ERR! C:\Users\wine&chord\AppData\Roaming\npm-cache\_logs\2019-01-15T13_08_57_636Z-debug.log 解决方法：换成淘宝的npm源。参考资料1$ npm config set registry "https://registry.npm.taobao.org" 常用命令123456$ hexo g # 生成静态文件$ hexo s # 启动本地服务器$ hexo d # 部署远端服务器$ hexo d -g # 生成部署$ hexo s -g # 生成预览$ hexo new "Post Name" # 新建一篇文章 2019.1.20 Update: 添加搜索功能参考资料 Git Bash Here 1npm install hexo-generator-searchdb --save blog/_config.yml中添加： 12345search： path: search.xml field: post format: html limit: 10000 以上每一个冒号后都有空格。 blog/themes/next/_config.yml中修改12local_search: enable: true 添加 DISQUS参考资料先按Disqus网站步骤来，然后在blog/themes/next/_config.yml中进行修改：1234disqus: enable: true shortname: wineandchord #your name count: true

entry.title: 883. Projection Area of 3D Shapes-Math-2
entry.content: 问题描述leetcode 883将一个由小方块组成的物体放置在一个三维空间xyz里，考察这个物体在xy，yz，zx面上的投影。要求计算这三个投影的总面积。输入 $v=grid[i][j]$ 表示 $(i,j)$ 处的高度为 $v$。123456789101112input:[[2]]output:5 # 2+2+1input:[[1,2],[3,4]] # (0,0)处高度为1# (0,1)处高度为2# (1,0)处高度为3# (1,1)处高度为4output:17 # 4+7+6 (xy+yz+zx) 思路首先得出 $grid$ 每一个维度的最大值，假如为 $m\times n$，并数出 $grid$ 中一共有 $k$ 个元素。则 对于xy面上： $$S_{xy} = k$$ 对于yz面上，令 $h_y[j]$ 为 $y=j$ 时 $z$ 的取值，则有 $$h_y[j] = \max_{0\le i\le m-1}(grid[i][j])$$则 $$S_{yz} = \sum_{j=0}^{n-1}h_y[j]$$ 对于zx面上，令 $h_x[i]$ 为 $x=i$ 时 $z$ 的取值，则有 $$h_x[i] = \max_{0\le j \le n-1}(grid[i][j])$$从而 $$S_{zx} = \sum_{i=0}^{m-1}h_x[i]$$12345678910111213141516171819202122# 伪代码S_xy = 0 # 用于记录xy上的面积m = grid.sizen = grid[0].sizeS_yz = 0 # 记录yz上的面积for j = 0 to n-1 h_y = 0 for i = 0 to m-1 if grid[i][j] > 0 S_xy++ if grid[i][j] > h_y h_y = grid[i][j] S_yz += h_yS_zx = 0 # 记录zx上的面积for i = 0 to m-1 h_x = 0 for j = 0 to n-1 if grid[i][j] > h_x h_x = grid[i][j] S_zx += h_xS_total = S_xy + S_yz + S_zx 实现123456789101112131415161718192021int projectionArea(vector<vector<int>>& grid) { int m = grid.size(); int n = m; //grid[0].size(); int S_xy, S_yz, S_zx; S_xy = S_yz = S_zx = 0; for(int j = 0; j < n; j++){ int h_y = 0; for(int i = 0; i < m; i++){ if(grid[i][j]) S_xy++; h_y = grid[i][j] > h_y ? grid[i][j] : h_y; } S_yz += h_y; } for(int i = 0; i < m; i++){ int h_x = 0; for(int j = 0; j < n; j++) h_x = grid[i][j] > h_x ? grid[i][j] : h_x; S_zx += h_x; } return S_xy + S_yz + S_zx;} 题解把两重循环简化成一重循环了，还有一点就是它直接认为是 $N \times N$ 的大小，所以只用了一个变量（题目中确实有说），我想复杂了，认为每一行的长度可能不同，如果题目这样出的话我觉着可能少不了一次遍历，找到列数的最大值，不过这样的话后面的循环就必须重复两次了。123456789101112131415int N = grid.size();int ans = 0;for (int i = 0; i < N; ++i) { int bestRow = 0; // largest of grid[i][j] int bestCol = 0; // largest of grid[j][i] for (int j = 0; j < N; ++j) { if (grid[i][j] > 0) ans++; // top shadow bestRow = max(bestRow, grid[i][j]); bestCol = max(bestCol, grid[j][i]); } ans += bestRow + bestCol;}return ans;

entry.title: 728. Self Dividing Numbers-Math-1
entry.content: 问题描述问一个范围内有哪些数是可以被他们的每一位整除的？ 实现123# Pythonis_self_dividing = lambda num: '0' not in str(num) and all([num%int(digit)==0 for digit in str(num)])return filter(is_self_dividing, range(left, right+1)) 12345678// C++vector<int> res;for(int i = left, n = 0; i <= right; i++){ for(n = i; n > 0; n /= 10) if(!(n%10) || i%(n%10)) break; if(!n) res.push_back(i);}return res;

entry.title: 788. Rotated Digits-String-12
entry.content: 问题描述找出一个范围内有多少个好数。 实现1234567def rotatedDigits(self, N): s1 = set([1,8,0]) s2 = set([1,8,0,6,9,2,5]) def isGood(x): s = set([int(i) for i in str(x)]) return s.issubset(s2) and not s.issubset(s1) return sum(isGood(i) for i in range(N+1))

entry.title: 696. Count Binary Substrings-String-11
entry.content: 问题描述一个字符串中连续且长度相等的 ‘1’ ‘0’ 子串个数。 实现1234567891011// C++int cur = 1, pre = 0, res = 0;for(int i = 1; i < s.size(); i++){ if(s[i] == s[i-1]) cur++; else{ res += min(cur, pre); pre = cur; cur = 1; }}return res + min(cur, pre);

entry.title: 520. Detect Capital-String-10
entry.content: 问题描述检测大小写使用是否正确 实现1234int cnt = 0;for(char c: word) if('Z' - c >= 0) cnt++;return (cnt==0 || cnt == word.size()) || (cnt==1 && 'Z' - word[0] >= 0);

entry.title: 824. Goat Latin-String-9
entry.content: 问题描述说羊语 实现 建立一个元音集 把字符串分割成单词 检查每个单词是否以元音开头 不是的话首字母后置123456789unordered_set<char> vowel({'a', 'e', 'i', 'o', 'u', 'A', 'E', 'I', 'O', 'U'});istringstream iss(S);string res, w;int i = 0, j;while(iss >> w){ res += ' ' + (vowel.count(w[0]) == 1 ? w : w.substr(1) + w[0] + "ma"); for(j = 0, ++i; j < i; j++) res += "a";}return res.substr(1);

entry.title: 893.Groups of Special-Equivalent Strings-String-7
entry.content: 问题描述找到字符串数组中有多少组是相等价的。 解法12345678Set<String> seen = new HashSet();for(String S: A){ int[] count = new int[52]; for(int i =0; i < S.length(); i++) count[S.charAt(i) - 'a' + 26*(i%2)]++; seen.add(Arrays.toString(count));}return seen.size(); 12345678910111213// C++set<pair<string, string>> s;for(const auto& w: A){ pair<string, string> p; for(int i = 0; i < w.size(); i++){ if(i % 2) p.first += w[i]; else p.second += w[i]; } sort(p.first.begin(), p.first.end()); sort(p.second.begin(), p.second.end()); s.insert(p);}return s.size();

entry.title: 344. Reverse String-String-6
entry.content: 问题描述翻转字符串 实现1234int i = 0, j = s.size() - 1;while(i < j) swap(s[i++], s[j--]);return s;

entry.title: 557. Reverse Word in a StringIII-String-5
entry.content: 问题描述对字符串中每个单词进行字母翻转 实现123456789for(int i = 0; i < s.length(); i++){ if(s[i] != ' '){ int j = i; for(;j < s.length() && s[j] != ' '; j++); reverse(s.begin()+i, s.begin()+j); i = j-1; }}return s;

entry.title: 657. Robot Return to Origin-4
entry.content: 问题描述一个机器人从原点开始，给一个移动序列，问最终是否能够回到原点。 实现123456789// simulationint x = 0, y = 0;for(char move: moves.toCharArray()){ if(move == 'U') y--; else if(move == 'D') y++; else if(move == 'L') x--; else if(move == 'R') x++;}return x == 0 && y == 0;

entry.title: 804. Unique Morse Code Words-3
entry.content: 问题描述给出一个字符串的莫尔斯码变换 实现12345678910111213// JavaString MORSE = new String[]{".-","-...","-.-.","-..",".","..-.","--.", "....","..",".---","-.-",".-..","--","-.", "---",".--.","--.-",".-.","...","-","..-", "...-",".--","-..-","-.--","--.."};Set<String> seen = new HashSet();for(String word: words){ StringBuilder code = new StringBuilder(); for(char c: word.toCharArray()) code.append(MORSE[c-'a']); seen.add(code.toString());}return seen.size(); 123456789// C++vector<string> d = {};unordered_set<string> s;for(auto word: words){ string code; for(auto c: word) code += d[c-'a']; s.insert(code);}return s.size();

entry.title: 709. To Lower Case-2
entry.content: 问题描述实现变小写 实现12345for(char& c: str){ if(c >= 'A' && c <= 'Z') c += 'a' - 'A';}return str;

entry.title: 929. Unique Email Addresses-String-1
entry.content: 问题描述邮件中本地名里面含有 ‘.’ 的会被忽略，含有 ‘+’ 的，其后面的所有会被忽略。这两条规则均不适用于域名。给一个发送邮件地址的 list，问实际上有哪些地址收到了邮件？ Canonical Form 分开本地名和域名 本地名中 ‘+’ 后面的完全取掉 取掉本地名中的所有 ‘.’1234567891011121314public int numUniqueEmails(String[] emails){ Set<String> seen = new HashSet(); for(String email: emails){ int i = email.indexOf('@'); String local = email.substring(0, i); String rest = email.substring(i); if(local.contains("+")){ local = local.substring(0, local.indexOf('+')); } local = local.replaceAll(".", ""); seen.add(local+rest); } return seen.size();} 123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930# Pythondef numUniqueEmails(self, emails): seen = set() for email in emails: local, _, domain = email.partition('@') if '+' in local: local = local[:local.index('+')] seen.add(local.replace('.', '') + '@' + domain) return len(seen)// C++int numUniqueEmails(vector<string>& emails){ unordered_set<string> res; vector<char> domain = {}; vector<char> local = {}; for(auto email: emails){ domain.clear(); local.clear(); for(int i = email.length()-1; i > -1; --i){ domain.push_back(email[i]); if(email[i] == '@') break; } for(int i = 0; i < email.length(); i++){ if(email[i] == '.') continue; if(email[i] == '@' || email[i] == '+') break; local.push_back(email[i]); } res.insert(string(local.begin(), local.end()) + string(domain.rbegin(), domain.rend())); } return res.size();} time: $O(C)$ space: $O(C)$

entry.title: 378. Kth Smallest Element in a Sorted Matrix-Heap-4
entry.content: 问题描述给一个nxn矩阵，每一行每一列都是升序。找到矩阵中第k小的元素。 方法一：堆 用第一行的元素建立一个最小堆。 123456789101112131415161718192021222324public int kthSmallest(int[][] matrix, int k){ int n = matrix.length; PriorityQueue<Tuple> pq = new PriorityQueue<Tuple>(); for(int j = 0; j <= n-1; j++) pq.offer(new Tuple(0, j, matrix[0][j])); for(int i = 0; i < k-1; i++){ Tuple t = pq.poll(); if(t.x == n-1) continue; pq.offer(new Tuple(t.x+1, t.y, matrix[t.x+1][t.y])); } return pq.poll().val;}class Tuple implements Comparable<Tuple>{ int x, y, val; public Tuple(int x, int y, int val){ this.x = x; this.y = y; this.val = val; } @Override public int compareTo(Tuple that){ return this.val - that.val; }} 方法二：二分查找1234567891011121314public int kthSmallest(int[][] matrix, int k){ int lo = matrix[0][0], hi = matrix[matrix.length-1][matrix[0].length-1] + 1; // [lo, hi) while(lo < hi){ int mid = lo + (hi-lo) / 2; int count = 0, j = matrix[0].length - 1; for(int i = 0; i < matrix[0].length; i++){ while(j >= 0 && matrix[i][j] > mid) j--; count += (j+1); } if(count < k) lo = mid + 1; else hi = mid; } return lo;}

entry.title: 347. Top K Frequent Elements-Heap-3
entry.content: 问题描述给一个非空整数数组，返回 k most frequent elements 实现1234567891011121314151617181920// C++ using hash table and bucket sortvector<int> topKFrequent(vector<int>& nums, int k){ // nums = [1,1,1,2,2,3] unordered_map<int, int> m; for(int num: nums) m[num]++; // m = {1:3, 2:2, 3:1} vector<vector<int>> buckets(nums.size()+1); for(auto p:m) buckets[p.second].push_back(p.first); // buckets = [[],[3],[2],[1]] vector<int> ans; for(int i = buckets.size()-1; i >= 0 && ans.size() < k; --i){ for(int num: buckets[i]){ ans.push_back(num); if(ans.size()==k) break; } } return ans;}

entry.title: 451. Sort Characters By Frequency-Heap-2
entry.content: 问题描述给一个字符串，按照频率下降的顺序对字符进行排序。 实现123456789101112131415161718192021222324string frequencySort(string s){ int counts[256] = {0}; for(char ch: s) counts[ch]++; sort(s.begin(), s.end(), [&](char a, char b){ return counts[a]>counts[b] || (counts[a] == counts[b] && a < b) }); return s;}// anotherstring frequencySort(string s){ unordered_map<char, int> freq; vector<string> bucket(s.size()+1, ""); string res; for(char c:s) freq[c]++; for(auto& it:freq){ int n = it.second; char c = it.first; bucket[n].append(n, c); } for(int i = s.size(); i > 0; i--) if(!bucket[i].empty()) res.append(bucket[i]); return res;}

entry.title: 703. Kth Largest Element in a Stream-Heap-1
entry.content: 问题描述设计一个类来找到一个流中第 k 大的元素。类初始的时候有 k 和一个数组 nums。之后每进行添加元素的操作时都要能够返回第 k 大的元素。123456789class KthLargest {public: KthLargest(int k, vector<int> nums){ } int add(int val){ }} 12345678int k = 3;int[] arr = [4,5,8,2];KthLargest kthLargest = new KthLargest(3, arr);kthLargest.add(3); // [2,3,4,5,8]: returns 4kthLargest.add(5); // [2,3,4,5,5,8]: return 5kthLargest.add(10); // [2,3,4,5,5,8,10]: return 5kthLargest.add(9); // [2,3,4,5,5,8,9,10]: return 8kthLargest.add(4); // [2,3,4,4,5,5,8,9,10]: return 8 解法思路：建立一个只含有 k 的比较大元素的最小堆。对于 add: 比较新加入的元素 x 和堆中的最小值，决定我们是否要 pop min insert x 并且要考虑 heap_size 小于 k 的情况对于构造，只需调用 N 次 add 即可 123456789101112131415// C++priority_queue<int, vector<int>, greater<int>> pq;int size;KthLargest(int k, vector<int> nums){ size = k; for(int i = 0; i < nums.size(); i++){ pq.push(nums[i]); if(pq.size() > k) pq.pop(); }}int add(int val){ pq.push(val); if(pq.size() > size) pq.pop(); return pq.top();} 12345678910111213141516# Pythonclass KthLargest(object): def __init__(self, k, nums): self.pool = nums self.k = k heapq.heapify(self.pool) while len(self.pool) > k: heapq.heappop(self.pool) def add(self, val): if len(self.pool) < self.k: heapq.heappush(self.pool, val) elif val > self.pool[0]: # pop and return the smallest item from the heap # and also push the new item heapq.heapreplace(self.pool, val) return self.pool[0]

entry.title: 112. Path Sum-DFS-9
entry.content: 问题描述给定一个二叉树和一个数，问是否有一条从根到叶子结点的路径使得路径上的长度和等于这个数？ 实现12345bool hasPathSum(TreeNode* root, int sum){ if(root == NULL) return false; if(root->val == sum && root->left == NULL && root->right == NULL) return true; return hasPathSum(root->left, sum-root->val) || hasPathSum(root->right, sum-root->val);}

entry.title: 743. Network Delay Time-DFS-8
entry.content: 问题描述一个有向图，time[i] = (u, v, w) 表示从 u 到 v 需要花费 w 的时间。问从 K 发一个信号，多长时间后所有的结点都能收到？ DFS用 dist[node] 来表示信号到达该结点的时间。收到信号之后从发送最快的边转发出去。123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930// JavaMap<Integer, Integer> dist;public int networkDelayTime(int[][] times, int N, int K){ Map<Integer, List<int[]>> graph = new HashMap(); for(int[] edge: times){ if(!graph.containsKey(edge[0])) graph.put(edge[0], new ArrayList<int[]>()); graph.get(edge[0]).add(new int[]{edge[2], edge[1]}); } for(int node: graph.keySet()){ Collections.sort(graph.get(node), (a, b)->a[0]-b[0]); } dist = new HashMap(); for(int node = 1; node <= N; node++) dist.put(node, Integer.MAX_VALUE); dfs(graph, K, 0); int ans = 0; for(int cand: dist.values()){ if(cand == Integer.MAX_VALUE) return -1; ans = Math.max(ans, cand); } return ans;}public void dfs(Map<Integer, List<int[]>> graph, int node, int elapsed){ if(elapsed >= dist.get(node)) return; dist.put(node, elapsed); if(graph.containsKey(node)) for(int[] info: graph.get(node)) dfs(graph, info[1], elapsed+info[0]);} 1234567891011121314# Pythondef networkDelayTime(self, times, N, K): graph = collections.defaultdict(list) for u, v, w in times: graph[u].append((w, v)) dist = {node: float('inf') for node in xrange(1, N+1)} def dfs(node, elapsed): if elapsed >= dist[node]: return dist[node] = elapsed for time, nei in sorted(graph[node]): dfs(nei, elapsed+time) dfs(K, 0) ans = max(dist.values()) return ans if ans < float('-1') else -1 Dijkstra’s Algorithm1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526// JavaMap<Integer, Integer> dist;public int networkDelayTime(int[][] times, int N, int k){ Map<Integer, List<int[]>> graph = new HashMap(); for(int[] edge: times){ if(!graph.containsKey(edge[0])) graph.put(edge[0], new ArrayList<int[]>()); graph.get(edge[0]).add(new int[]{edge[1], edge[2]}); } dist = new HashMap(); for(int node = 1; node <= N; node++) dist.put(node, Integer.MAX_VALUE); dist.put(K, 0); boolean[] seen = new boolean[N+1]; while(true){ int candNode = -1; int candDist = Integer.MAX_VALUE; for(int i = 1; i <= N; i++){ if(!seen[i] && dist.get(i) < candDist){ candDist = dist.get(i); candNode = i; } } }}

entry.title: 110. Balanced Binary Tree-DFS-7
entry.content: 问题描述判断是否是平衡的。 top-down12345678910int depth(TreeNode* root){ if(!root) return 0; return max(depth(root->left), depth(root->right))+1;}bool isBlanced(TreeNode* root){ if(!root) return true; int left = depth(root->left); int right = depth(root->right); return abs(left-right) <= 1 && isBalanced(root->left) && isBalanced(root->right);} bottom-up123456789101112int dfsHeight(TreeNode* root){ if(!root) return 0; int leftHeight = dfsHeight(root->left); if(leftHeight == -1) return -1; int rightHeight = dfsHeight(root->right); if(rightHeight == -1) return -1; if(abs(leftHeight - rightHeight) > 1) return -1; return max(leftHeight, rightHeight) + 1;}bool isBlanced(TreeNode* root){ return dfsHeight(root) != -1;}

entry.title: 101. Symmetric Tree-DFS-6
entry.content: 问题描述判断二叉树是否对称。 递归123456789// Javapublic boolean isSymmetric(TreeNode root){ return isMirror(root, root);}public boolean isMirror(TreeNode t1, TreeNode t2){ if(!t1 && !t2) return true; if(!t1 || !t2) return false; return (t1.val==t2.val) && isMirror(t1.right, t2.left) && isMirror(t1.left, t2.right);} 123456789// C++bool isSymmetric(TreeNode* root) { return isMirror(root, root);}bool isMirror(TreeNode* t1, TreeNode* t2){ if(!t1 && !t2) return true; if(!t1 || !t2) return false; return (t1->val == t2->val) && isMirror(t1->right, t2->left) && isMirror(t1->left, t2->right);} time: $O(n)$ space: $O(n)$ 迭代1234567891011121314151617public boolean isSymmetric(TreeNode root){ Queue<TreeNode> q = new LinkedList<>(); q.add(root); q.add(root); while(!q.empty()){ TreeNode t1 = q.poll(); TreeNode t2 = q.poll(); if(!t1 && !t2) continue; if(!t1 || !t2) return false; if(t1.val != t2.val) return false; q.add(t1.left); q.add(t2.right); q.add(t1.right); q.add(t2.left); } return true;} time: $O(n)$ space: $O(n)$

entry.title: 257. Binary Tree Paths-DFS-5
entry.content: 问题描述找到所有从根到叶子的路径。 解法1234567891011// Javapublic List<String> binaryTreePaths(TreeNode root){ List<String> answer = new ArrayList<String>(); if(root != null) searchBT(root, "", answer); return answer;}private void searchBT(TreeNode root, String path, List<String> answer){ if(root.left == null && root.right == null) answer.add(path+root.val); if(root.left != null) searchBT(root.left, path+root.val+"->", answer); if(root.right != null) searchBT(root.right, path+root.val+"->", answer);} 123456789101112131415// C++void binaryTreePaths(vector<string>& result, TreeNode* root, string t){ if(!root->left && !root->right) { result.push_back(t); return; } if(root->left) binaryTreePaths(result, root->left, t+"->"+to_string(root->left->val)); if(root->right) binaryTreePaths(result, root->right, t+"->"+to_string(root->right->val));}vector<string> binaryTreePaths(TreeNode* root){ vector<string> result; if(!root) return result; binaryTreePaths(result, root, to_string(root->val)); return result;}

entry.title: 108. Convert Sorted Array to Binary Search Tree-DFS-4
entry.content: 问题描述给一个升序的数组，将其转化为平衡二叉树。 递归1234567891011TreeNode* sortedArrayToBST(vector<int>& num){ if(num.size() == 0) return NULL; if(num.size() == 1) return new TreeNode(num[0]); int middle = num.size()/2; TreeNode* root = new TreeNode(num[middle]); vector<int> leftInts(num.begin(), num.begin()+middle); vector<int> rightInts(num.begin()+middle+1, num.end()); root->left = sortedArrayToBST(leftInts); root->right = sortedArrayToBST(rightInts); return root;}

entry.title: 733. Flood Fill-DFS-3
entry.content: 问题描述用一个像素值来填充图片中同色的区域。12345678image =1 1 11 1 01 0 1(sr,sc)=(1,1), newColor=2 ->2 2 22 2 02 0 1 DFS123456789101112131415// Javapublic int[][] floodFill(int[][] image, int sr, int sc, int newColor){ int color = image[sr][sc]; if(color != newColor) dfs(image, sr, sc, color, newColor); return image;}public void dfs(int[][] image, int r, int c, int color, int newColor){ if(image[r][c] == color){ image[r][c] = newColor; if(r >= 1) dfs(image, r-1, c, color, newColor); if(c >= 1) dfs(image, r, c-1, color, newColor); if(r+1 < image.length) dfs(image, r+1, c, color, newColor); if(c+1 < image[0].length) dfs(image, r, c+1, color, newColor); }} 1234567891011121314# Pythondef floodFill(self, image, sr, sc, newColor): R, C = len(image), len(image[0]) color = image[sr][sc]; if color == newColor: return image def dfs(r, c): if image[r][c] == color: image[r][c] = newColor if r >= 1: dfs(r-1, c) if r+1 < R: dfs(r+1, c) if c >= 1: dfs(r, c-1) if c+1 < C: dfs(r, c+1) dfs(sr, sc) return image time: $O(N)$ space: $O(N)$

entry.title: 100. Same Tree-DFS-2
entry.content: 问题描述判断两个树是否一样 解法1234bool isSameTree(TreeNode* p, TreeNode* q){ if(p == NULL || q == NULL) return (p==q); return (p->val == q->val && isSameTree(p->left, q->left) && isSameTree(p->right, q->right));}

entry.title: 897. Increasing Order Search Tree-DFS-1
entry.content: 问题描述给一个树，根据它的中序遍历序列重新进行调整，使每一个结点只有有孩子没有左孩子。123456struct TreeNode{ int val; TreeNode *left; TreeNode *right; TreeNode(int x): val(x), left(NULL), right(NULL){}}; 中序遍历1234567891011121314151617// Javapublic TreeNode increasingBST(TreeNode root){ List<Integer> vals = new ArrayList(); inorder(root, vals); TreeNode ans = new TreeNode(0), cur = ans; for(int v: vals){ cur.right = new TreeNode(v); cur = cur.right; } return ans.right;}public void inorder(TreeNode node, List<Integer> vals){ if(!node) return; inorder(node.left, vals); vals.add(node.val); inorder(node.right, vals);} 123456789101112# Pythondef increasingBST(self, root): def inorder(node): if node: yield from inorder(node.left) yield node.val yield from inorder(node.right) ans = cur = TreeNode(None) for v in inorder(root): cur.right = TreeNode(v) cur = cur.right return ans.right 1234567891011// C++TreeNode* increasingBST(TreeNode* root){ return increasintBST(root, NULL);}TreeNode* increasingBST(TreeNode* root, TreeNode* tail = NULL){ if(!root) return tail; TreeNode* res = increasingBST(root->left, root); root->left = NULL; root->right = increasingBST(root->right, tail); return res;} time: $O(N)$ space: $O(N)$

entry.title: 872. Leaf-Similar Trees-Tree-10
entry.content: 问题描述判断两个二叉树各自的叶节点序列是否相同123456struct TreeNode{ int val; TreeNode *left; TreeNode *right; TreeNode(int x): val(x), left(NULL), right(NULL){}} DFS1234567891011121314bool leafSimilar(TreeNode* root1, TreeNode* root2){ vector<int> leaves1; vector<int> leaves2; dfs(root1, leaves1); dfs(root2, leaves2); return leaves1 == leaves2;}void dfs(TreeNode* node, vector<int>& leaves){ if(node == NULL) return; if(node->left == NULL && node->right == NULL) leaves.push_back(node->val); dfs(node->left, leaves); dfs(node->right, leaves);} time: $O(T_1+T_2)$ space: $O(T_1+T_2)$

entry.title: 104. Maximum Depth of Binary Tree-Tree-9
entry.content: 问题描述找出一个二叉树的最大深度123456struct TreeNode{ int val; TreeNode *left; TreeNode *right; TreeNode(int x): val(x), left(NULL), right(NULL){}}; 递归12345// C++int maxDepth(TreeNode *root){ if(root == NULL) return 0; return max(1+maxDepth(root->left), 1+maxDepth(root->right));} time: $O(N)$ space: $O(N)$, best case: $O(logN)$ 迭代使用一个栈，通过深度优先搜索来访问每一个结点，用max来记录其最大深度 12345678910111213# Pythondef maxDepth(self, root): stack = [] if root is not None: stack.append((1, root)) depth = 0 while stack: current_depth, root = stack.pop() if root is not None: depth = max(depth, current_depth) stack.append((current_depth+1, root.left)) stack.append((current_depth+1, root.right)) return depth time: $O(N)$ space: $O(N)$BFS12345678910111213141516int maxDepth(TreeNode *root){ if(root == NULL) return 0; int res = 0; queue<TreeNode*> q; q.push(root); while(!q.empty()){ res++; for(int i = 0, n = q.size(); i < n; i++){ TreeNode *p = q.front(); q.pop(); if(p->left != NULL) q.push(p->left); if(p->right != NULL) q.push(p->right); } } return res;}

entry.title: 559. Maximum Depth of N-ary Tree-Tree-8
entry.content: 问题描述给一个N叉树，找到最大深度。12345678910class Node{public: int val; vector<Node*> children; Node() {} Node(int _val, vector<Node*> _children){ val = _val; children = _children; }}; 递归使用深度优先搜索1234567891011// Javapublic int maxDepth(Node root){ if(root == null) return 0; else if(root.children.isEmpty()) return 1; else{ List<Integer> heights = new LinkedList<>(); for(Node item: root.children) heights.add(maxDepth(item)); return Collections.max(heights) + 1; }} 123456789# Pythondef maxDepth(self, root): if root is None: return 0; elif root.children == []: return 1 else: height = [self.maxDepth(c) for c in root.children] return max(height) + 1 12345678// C++int maxDepth(Node* root){ if(!root) return 0; int res = 1; for(Node* child: root->children) res = max(res, maxDepth(child)+1); return res;} time: $O(N)$ space: worst case:$O(N)$, best case:$O(logN)$迭代使用一个栈来把递归变为迭代1234567891011121314151617181920// Javaimport javafx.util.Pair;import java.lang.Math;public int maxDepth(Node root){ Queue<Pair<Node, Integer>> stack = new LinkedList<>(); if(root != null) stack.add(new Pair(root, 1));}int depth = 0;while(!stack.isEmpty()){ Pair<Node, Integer> current = stack.poll(); root = current.getKey(); int current_depth = current.getValue(); if(root != null){ depth = Math.max(depth, current_depth); for(Node c: root.children){ stack.add(new Pair(c, current_depth + 1)); } } return depth;} 12345678910111213# Pythondef maxDepth(self, root): stack = [] if root is not None: stack.append((1, root)) depth = 0 while stack != []: current_depth, root = stack.pop() if root is not None: depth = max(depth, current_depth) for c in root.children: stack.append((current_depth+1, c)) return depth time: $O(N)$ space: $O(N)$BFS1234567891011121314151617int maxDepth(Node* root){ if(root == nullptr) return 0; queue<Node*> q; q.push(root); int depth = 0; while(!q.empty()){ depth += 1; int breadth = q.size(); for(int _ = 0; _ < breadth; _++){ auto node = q.front(); q.pop(); for(auto child: node->children) if(child) q.push(child); } } return depth;}

entry.title: 700. Search in a Binary Search Tree-Tree-7
entry.content: 问题描述实现二叉搜索树的查找功能123456struct TreeNode{ int val; TreeNode *left; TreeNode *right; TreeNode(int x): val(x), left(NULL), right(NULL){}}; 解法12345678910111213// iterativeTreeNode* searchBST(TreeNode* root, int val){ while(root != nullptr && root->val != val){ root = (root->val > val) ? root->left : root->right; } return root;}// recursiveTreeNode* searchBST(TreeNode* root, int val){ if(root == null) return root; if(root->val == val) return root; return root->val > val ? searchBST(root->left, val) : searchBST(root->right, val);}

entry.title: 94. Binary Tree Inorder Traversal-Tree-6
entry.content: 问题描述二叉树中序遍历123456struct TreeNode{ int val; TreeNode* left; TreeNode* right; TreeNode(int x): val(x), left(NULL), right(NULL){}}; 递归1234567891011121314public List<Integer> inorderTraversal(TreeNode root){ List<Integer> res = new ArrayList<>(); helper(root, res); return res;}public void helper(TreeNode root, List<Integer> res){ if(root != null){ if(root.left != null) helper(root.left, res); res.add(root.val); if(root.right != null) helper(root.right, res); }} time: $O(n)$ space: $O(n)$, average: $O(logn)$ 迭代123456789101112131415public List<Integer> inorderTraversal(TreeNode root){ List<Integer> res = new ArrayList<>(); Stack<TreeNode> stack = new Stack<>(); TreeNode curr = root; while(curr != null || !stack.isEmpty()){ while(curr != null){ stack.push(curr); curr = curr.left; } curr = stack.pop(); res.add(curr.val); curr = curr.right; } return res;} time: $O(n)$ space: $O(n)$Morris需要使用线索二叉树。12345678step 1: initialize current as rootstep 2: while current is not NULL if current does not have left child a. Add current's value b. Go to the right, i.e., current = current.right else a. In current's left subtree, make current the right child of the rightmost node b. Go to this left child, i.e., current = current.left 1234567891011121314151617181920public List<Integer> inorderTraversal(TreeNode root){ List<Integer> res = new ArrayList<>(); TreeNode curr = root; TreeNode pre; while(curr != null){ if(curr.left == null){ res.add(curr.val); curr = curr.right; // move to next right node } else { // has a left subtree pre = curr.left; while(pre.right != null) // find rightmost pre = pre.right; pre.right = curr; // put cur after the pre node TreeNode temp = curr; // store cur node curr = curr.left; // move cur to the top of the new tree temp.left = null; // original cur left be null, avoid infinite loops } } return res;} time: $O(n)$ space: $O(n)$ C++ Interative, Recursive and Morris123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142434445464748495051525354// iterativevector<int> inorderTraversal(TreeNode* root){ vector<int> nodes; stack<TreeNode*> todo; TreeNode* cur = root; while(cur || !todo.empty()){ if(cur) { todo.push(cur); cur = cur->left; } else { cur = todo.top(); todo.pop(); nodes.push_back(cur->val); cur = cur->right; } } return nodes;}// recursivevector<int> inorderTraversal(TreeNode* root){ vector<int> nodes; inorder(root, nodes); return nodes;}void inorder(TreeNode* root, vector<int>& nodes){ if(!root) return; inorder(root->left, nodes); nodes.push_back(root->val); inorder(root->right, nodes);}// Morris traversalvector<int> inorderTraversal(TreeNode* root){ TreeNode* cur = root; vector<int> nodes; while(cur){ if(cur->left){ TreeNode* pre = cur->left; while(pre->right && (pre->right != cur)) pre = pre->right; if(!(pre->right)){ pre->right = cur; cur = cur->left; } else { pre->right = NULL; nodes.push_back(cur->val); cur = cur->right; } } else { nodes.push_bakc(cur->val); cur = cur->right; } } return nodes;}

entry.title: 590. N-ary Tree Postorder Traversal-Tree-5
entry.content: 问题描述多叉树后序遍历12345678910class Node{public: int val; vector<Node*> children; Node() {} Node(int _val, vector<Node*> _children){ val = _val; chilren = _children; }}; 迭代123456789101112131415// Javapublic List<Integer> postorder(Node root){ LinkedList<Node> stack = new LinkedList<>(); LinkedList<Integer> output = new LinkedList<>(); if(root == null) return output; stack.add(root); while(!stack.isEmpty()){ Node node = stack.pollLast(); output.addFirst(node.val); for(Node item: node.children){ if(item != null) stack.add(item); } } return output;} 123456789101112# Pythondef postorder(self, root): if root is None: return [] stack, output = [root, ], [] while stack: root = stack.pop() if root is not None: output.append(root.val) for c in root.children: stack.append(c) return output[::-1] 12345678910111213141516// C++vector<int> postorder(Node* root){ if(root == NULL) return {}; vector<int> res; stack<Node*> stk; stk.push(root); while(!stk.empty()){ Node* temp = stk.top(); stk.pop(); for(int i = 0; i < temp->children.size(); i++) stk.push(temp->children[i]); res.push_back(temp->val); } reverse(res.begin(), res.end()); return res;}

entry.title: 145. Binary Tree Postorder Traversal-Tree-4
entry.content: 问题描述二叉树的后序遍历1234567// definition for a binary tree nodestruct TreeNode{ int val; TreeNode *left; TreeNode *right; TreeNode(int x): val(x), left(NULL), right(NULL){}}; 迭代12345678910111213141516171819202122// Javapublic class TreeNode{ int val; TreeNode left; TreeNode right; TreeNode(int x){ val = x; }}public List<Integer> postorderTraversal(TreeNode root){ LinkedList<TreeNode> stack = new LinkedList<>(); LinkedList<Integer> output = new LinkedList<>(); if(root == null) return output; stack.add(root); while(!stack.isEmpty()){ TreeNode node = stack.pollLast(); output.addFirst(node.val); if(node.left!=null) stack.add(node.left); if(node.right!=null) stack.add(node.right); } return output;} 123456789101112131415161718# Pythonclass TreeNode(object): def __init__(self, x): self.val = x self.left = None self.right = Nonedef postorderTraversal(self, root): if root is None: return [] stack, output = [root, ], [] while stack: root = stack.pop() output.append(root.val) if root.left is not None: stack.append(root.left) if root.right is not None: stack.append(root.right) return output[::-1] time: $O(n)$ space: $O(n)$先序、中序、后序遍历总结123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142434445464748495051525354// Pre Order Traversalpublic List<Integer> preorderTraversal(TreeNode root){ List<Integer> result = new ArrayList<>(); Seque<TreeNode> stack = new ArrayDeque<>(); TreeNode p = root; while(!stack.isEmpty() || p != null){ if(p != null){ stack.push(p); result.add(p.val); p = p.left; } else{ TreeNode node = stack.pop(); p = node.right; } } return result;}// In Order Traversalpublic List<Integer> inorderTraversal(TreeNode root){ List<Integer> result = new ArrayList<>(); Deque<TreeNode> stack = new ArrayDeque<>(); TreeNode p = root; while(!stack.isEmpty() || p != null){ if(p != null){ stack.push(p); p = p.left; } else{ TreeNode node = stack.pop(); result.add(node.val); p = node.right; } } return result;}// Post Order Traversalpublic List<Integer> postorderTraversal(TreeNode root){ LinkedList<Integer> result = new LinkedList<>(); Deque<TreeNode> stack = new ArrayDeque<>(); TreeNode p = root; while(!stack.isEmpty() || p != null){ if(p != null){ stack.push(p); result.addFirst(p.val); // add in the front of list p = p.right; // reverse the process of preorder } else{ TreeNode node = stack.pop(); p = node.left; // reverse the process of preorder } } return result;} C++ Iterative, Recursive and Morris Traversal1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132333435363738394041424344454647484950515253545556575859606162636465666768697071727374757677787980818283// iterative with a stackvector<int> postorderTraversal(TreeNode* root){ vector<int> nodes; stack<TreeNode*> todo; TreeNode* cur = root; TreeNode* last = NULL; while(cur || !todo.empty()){ if(cur){ todo.push(cur); cur = cur->left; } else { TreeNode* top = todo.top(); if(top->right && (last != top->right)) cur = top->right; else { nodes.push_back(top->val); last = top; todo.pop(); } } } return nodes;}// recursivevector<int> postorderTraversal(TreeNode* root){ vector<int> nodes; postorder(root, nodes); return nodes;}void postorder(TreeNode* root, vector<int>& nodes){ if(!root) return; postorder(root->left, nodes); postorder(root->right, nodes); nodes.push_back(root->val);}// Morris traversalvector<int> postorderTraversal(TreeNode* root){ vector<int> nodes; TreeNode* dummy = new TreeNode(0); dummy->left = root; TreeNode* cur = dummy; while(cur){ if(cur->left){ TreeNode* pre = cur->left; while(pre->right && (pre->right != cur)){ pre = pre->right; } if(!(pre->right)){ pre->right = cur; cur = cur->left; } else { reverseAddNodes(cur->left, pre, nodes); pre->right = NULL; cur = cur->right; } } else { cur = cur->right; } } return nodes;}void reverseNodes(TreeNode* start, TreeNode* end){ if(start == end) return; TreeNode* x = start; TreeNode* y = start->right; TreeNode* z; while(x != end){ z = y->right; y->right = x; x = y; y = z; }}void reverseAddNodes(TreeNode* start, TreeNode* end, vector<int>& nodes){ reverseNodes(start, end); TreeNode* node = end; while(true){ nodes.push_back(node->val); if(node == start) break; node = node->right; } reverseNodes(end, start);}

entry.title: 144. Binary Tree Preorder Traversal-Tree-3
entry.content: 问题描述二叉树的先序遍历 递归+迭代1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132333435// recursivepublic List<Integer> preorderTraversal(TreeNode root){ List<Integer> pre = new LinkedList<Integer>(); if(root==null) return pre; pre.add(root.val); pre.addAll(preorderTraversal(root.left)); pre.addAll(preorderTraversal(root.right)); return pre;}// recursive with a helperpublic List<Integer> preorderTraversal(TreeNode root){ List<Integer> pre = new LinkedList<Integer>(); preHelper(root, pre); return pre;}public void preHelper(TreeNode root, List<Integer> pre){ if(root==null) return; pre.add(root.left, pre); preHelper(root.left, pre); preHelper(root.right, pre);}// iterative with stackpublic List<Integer> preorderIt(TreeNode root){ List<Integer> pre = new LinkedList<Integer>(); if(root == null) return pre; Stack<TreeNode> tovisit = new Stack<TreeNode>(); tovisit.push(root); while(!tovisit.empty()){ TreeNode visiting = tovisit.pop(); pre.add(visiting.val); if(visiting.right != null) tovisit.push(visiting.right); if(visiting.left != null) tovisit.push(visiting.left); } return pre;} 1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132333435363738394041424344454647484950515253545556575859606162636465666768697071// C++ four methods// recursivevector<int> preorderTraversal(TreeNode* root){ vector<int> v; preTraversal(root, v); return v;}void preTraversal(TreeNode* root, vector<int>& v){ if(!root) return ; v.push_back(root->val); preTraversal(root->left, v); preTraversal(root->right, v);}// iterate using a stackvector<int> preorderTraversal(TreeNode* root){ vector<int> v; if(!root) return v; TreeNode* temp = root; stack<TreeNode*> s; s.push(root); while(!s.empty()){ temp = s.top(); s.pop(); v.push_back(temp->val); if(temp->right) s.push(temp->right); if(temp->left) s.push(temp->left); }}vector<int> preorderTraversal(TreeNode* root){ vector<int> v; if(!root) return v; TreeNode* temp = root; stack<TreeNode*> s; while(true){ while(temp){ v.push_back(temp->val); if(temp->right) s.push(temp->right); temp = temp->left; } if(s.empty()) break; temp = s.top(); s.pop(); };}// morris traversal, O(1) spacevector<int> preorderTraversal(TreeNode* root){ vector<int> v; if(!root) return v; TreeNode* temp = root, *prev; while(temp){ if(!temp->left){ v.push_back(temp->val); temp = temp->right; } else{ prev = temp->left; while(prev->right && (prev->right != temp)) prev = prev->right; if(!prev->right){ v.push_back(temp->val); prev->right = temp; temp = temp->left; } else{ prev->right = NULL; temp = temp->right; } } } return v;} 迭代12345678910111213141516171819202122// Javapublic int TreeNode{ int val; TreeNode left; TreeNode right; TreeNode(int x){ val = x; }}public List<Integer> preorderTraversal(TreeNode root){ LinkedList<TreeNode> stack = new LinkedList<>(); LinkedList<Integer> output = new LinkedList<>(); if(root == null) return output; stack.add(root); while(!stack.isEmpty()){ TreeNode node = stack.pollLast(); output.add(node.val); if(node.right != null) stack.add(node.right); if(node.left != null) stack.add(node.left); } return output;} 12345678910111213141516171819# Pythonclass TreeNode(object): def __init__(self, x): self.val = x self.left = None self.right = Nonedef preorderTraversal(self, root): if root is None: return [] stack, output = [root, ], [] while stack: root = stack.pop() if root is not None: output.append(root.val) if root.right is not None: stack.append(root.right) if root.left is not None: stack.append(root.left) return output time: $O(N)$ space: $O(N)$Morris traversal主要用来优化空间复杂度。123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627// Javapublic List<Integer> preorderTraversal(TreeNode root){ LinkedList<Integer> output = new LinkedList<>(); TreeNode node = root; while(node != null){ if(node.left == null){ output.add(node.val); node = node.right; } else{ TreeNode predecessor = node.left; while((predecessor.right != null) && (predecessor.right != node)){ predecessor = predecessor.right; } if(predecessor.right == null){ output.add(node.val); predecessor.right = node; node = node.left; } else{ predecessor.right = null; node = node.right; } } } return output;} 12345678910111213141516171819# Python def preorderTraversal(self, root): node, output = root, [] while node: if not node.left: output.append(node.val) node = node.right else: predecessor = node.left while predecessor.right and predecessor.right is not node: predecessor = predecessor.right if not predecessor.right: output.append(node.val) predecessor.right = node node = node.left else: predecessor.right = None node = node.right return output time: $O(N)$ space: $O(N)$

entry.title: 589. N-ary Tree Preorder Traversal-Tree-2
entry.content: 问题描述N叉树先序遍历 迭代123456789101112131415161718192021222324// Java// Definition for a nodeclass Node{ public int val; public List<Node> children; public Node(){} public Node(int _val, List<Node> _children){ val = _val; children = _children; }};public List<Integer> preorder(Node root){ LinkedList<Node> stack = new LinkedList<>(); LinkedList<Integer> output = new LinkedList<>(); if(root == null) return output; stack.add(root); while(!stack.isEmpty()){ Node node = stack.pollLast(); output.add(node.val); Collections.reverse(node.children); for(Node item: node.children) stack.add(item); } return output;} 12345678910111213141516# Python# Definition for a nodeclass Node(object): def __init__(self, val, children): self.val = val self.children = childrenclass Solution(object): def preorder(self, root): if root is None: return [] stack, output = [root, ], [] while stack: root = stack.pop() output.append(root.val) stack.extend(root.children[::-1]) return output time: $O(N)$ space: $O(N)$C++ version123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839// Definition for a nodeclass Node{public: int val; vector<Node*> children; Node(){} Node(int _val, vector<Node*> _children){ val = _val; children = _children; }};// recursivevoid travel(Node* root, vector<int>& result){ if(root == nullptr) return; result.push_back(root->val); for(Node* child: root->child) travel(child, result);}vector<int> preorder(Node* root){ vector<int> result; travel(root, result); return result;}// iterativevector<int> preorder(Node* root){ vector<int> result; if(root == nullptr) return result; stack<Node*> stk; stk.push(root); while(!stk.empty()){ Node* cur = stk.top(); stk.pop(); result.push_back(cur->val); for(int i = cur->children.size()-1; i >= 0; i--){ if(cur->children[i] != nullptr) stk.push(cur->children[i]); } } return result;}

entry.title: 617. Merge Two Binary Trees-Tree-1
entry.content: 问题描述合并两棵二叉树 方法一：使用递归123456789101112131415// Javapublic class TreeNode{ int val; TreeNode left; TreeNode right; TreeNode(int x){ val = x; }}public TreeNode mergeTrees(TreeNode t1, TreeNode t2){ if(t1 == null) return t2; if(t2 == null) return t1; t1.val += t2.val; t1.left = mergeTrees(t1.left, t2.left); t1.right = mergeTrees(t1.right, t2.right); return t1;} 1234567# Pythondef mergeTrees(self, t1, t2): if not t1 and not t2: return None ans = TreeNode((t1.val if t1 else 0) + (t2.val if t2 else 0)) ans.left = self.mergeTrees(t1 and t1.left, t2 and t2.left) ans.right = self.mergeTrees(t1 and t1.right, t2 and t2.right) return ans time: $O(m)$ space: $O(m)$, average: $O(logm)$ 方法二：使用迭代123456789101112131415public TreeNode mergeTrees(TreeNode t1, TreeNode t2){ if(t1 == null) return t2; Stack<TreeNode[]> stack = new Stack<>(); stack.push(new TreeNode[]{t1, t2}); while(!stack.isEmpty()){ TreeNode[] t = stack.pop(); if(t[0] == null || t[1] == null) continue; t[0].val += t[1].val; if(t[0].left == null) t[0].left = t[1].left; else stack.push(new TreeNode[] {t[0].left, t[1].left}); if(t[0].right == null) t[0].right = t[1].right; else stack.push(new TreeNode[]{t[0].right, t[1].right}); } return t1;} time: $O(n)$ space: $O(n)$

entry.title: 706. Design HashMap-HT-13
entry.content: 问题描述设计一个 Hash Map12345678910111213class MyHashMap{public: MyHashMap(){} void put(int key, int value){} int get(int key){} void remove(int key){}};/*** MyHashMap obj = new MyHashMap();* obj.put(key, value);* int param_2 = obj.get(key);* obj.remove(key);*/ 1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132333435363738394041424344454647// JavaclassMyHashMap{ final Bucket[] buckets = new Bucket[10000]; public void put(int key, int value){ int i = idx(key); if(bucket[i] == null) bucket[i] = new Bucket(); ListNode prev = find(buckets[i], key); if(prev.next == null) prev.next = new ListNode(key, value); else prev.next.val = value; } public int get(int key){ int i = idx(key); if(buckets[i] == null) return -1; ListNode node = find(buckets[i], key); return node.next == null?-1:node.next.val; } public void remove(int key){ int i = idx(key); if(buckets[i] == null) return; ListNode prev = find(buckets[i], key); if(prev.next == null) return; prev.next = prev.next.next; } int idx(int key){ return Integer.hashCode(key) % buckets.length;} ListNode find(Bucket bucket, int key){ ListNode node = bucket.head, prev = null; While(node != null && node.key != key){ prev = node; node = node.next; } return prev; }}class Bucket{ final ListNode head = new ListNode(-1, -1);}class ListNode{ int key, val; ListNode next; ListNode(int key, int val){ this.key = key; this.val = val; }} 123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930// C++class MyHashMap(const static int size = 1000;std::array<vector<int>, size> vv;public: MyHashMap(){} void put(const int key, const int value){ int x = key / size; int y = key % size; if(vv[s].empty()){ vv[x] = vector<int>(size+1, -1); vv[x][size] = 0; } vv[x][y] = value; vv[x][size]++; } int get(const int key){ int x = key/size; int y = key%size; if(vv[x].empty() || vv[x][y] == -1) return -1; return vv[x][y]; } void remove(const int key){ int x = key/size; int y = key%size; if(vv[x].empty() || vv[x][y]==-1) return ; vv[x][y] = -1; if(--vv[x][size] == 0) vv[x].clear(); }) 123456789101112131415161718// C++ using vectorclass MyHashMap{public: MyHashMap(){ vec = std::vector<int>(1000001, -1); } void put(int key, int value){ vec[key] = value; } int get(int key){ return vec[key]; } void remove(int key){ vec[key] = -1; }private: std::vector<int> vec;}

entry.title: 242. Valid Anagram-HT-12
entry.content: 问题描述anagram: 字谜。确定一个字符串是不是另外一个字符串的字谜（他的排列形式） 方法一：排序12345678public boolean isAnagram(String s, String t){ if(s.length() != t.length()) return false; char[] str1 = s.toCharArray(); char[] str2 = t.toCharArray(); Arrays.sort(str1); Arrays.sort(str2); return Arrays.equals(str1, str2);} time: $O(nlogn)$ space: $O(1)$方法二：Hash Table123456789101112// Javapublic boolean isAnagram(String s, String t){ if(s.length() != t.length()) return false; int[] counter = new int[26]; for(int i = 0; i < s.length; i++){ counter[s.charAt(i)-'a']++; counter[t.charAt(i)-'a']--; } for(int count: counter) if(count) return false; return true;} 12345678910111213// C++bool isAnagram(string s, string t){ if(s.length() != t.length()) return false; int n = s.length(); unordered_map<char, int> counts; for(int i = 0; i < n; i++){ counts[s[i]]++; counts[t[i]]--; } for(auto count: counts) if(count.second) return false; return true;}

entry.title: 349. Interection of Two Arrays-HT-11
entry.content: 问题描述给两个数组，找出他们公有的元素。 解法12345678910vector<int> intersection(vector<int>& nums1, vector<int>& nums2){ unordered_set<int> m(nums1.begin(), nums1.end()); vector<int> res; for(auto a: nums2) if(m.count(a)){ res.push_back(a); m.erase(a); } return res;}

entry.title: 690. Employee Importance-HT-10
entry.content: 问题描述给定一个员工的数据结构，包括他特有的id和重要度和他直接下属的id。找出某一个员工及其下属的中重要度。12345678910111213141516171819202122// Employee infoclass Employee{public: int id; int importance; vector<int> subordinates;}// use depth-first search// JavaMap<Integer, Employee> emap;public int getImportance(List<Employee> employees, int queryid){ emap = new HashMap(); for(Employee e: employees) emap.put(e.id, e); return dfs(queryid);}public int dfs(int eid){ Employee employee = emap.get(eid); int ans = employee.importance; for(Integer subid: employee.subordinates) ans += dfs(subid); return ans;} 1234567# Pythondef getImportance(self, employee, query_id): emap = {e.id: e for e in employees} def dfs(eid): employee = emap[eid] return (employee.importance+sum(dfs(eid) for eid in employee.subordinates)) return dfs(query_id) 12345678910111213// C++int getImportance(vector<Employee*> employees, int id){ unordered_map<int, Employee*> map; for(const auto element: employees) map[element->id] = element; return help(map, id);}int help(unordered_map<int, Employee*>& map, const int id){ auto sum = map[id]->importance; for(const auto element: map[id]->subordinates) sum += help(map, element); return sum;} time: $O(n)$ space: $O(n)$

entry.title: 389. Find the Difference-HT-9
entry.content: 问题描述两个字符串只有小写字母，其中一个是有另一个随机排序并在随机位置上增加的一个字母，问新增加的字母是什么？ 解法1234567// bit manipulationchar findTheDifference(string s, string t){ char r = 0; for(char c:s) r ^= c; for(char c:t) r ^= c; return r;} 12345678910111213141516171819202122232425# Python # dictdef findTheDifference(self, s, t): dic = {} for ch in s: dic[ch] = dic.get(ch, 0) + 1 for ch in t: if dic.get(ch, 0) == 0: return ch else: dic[ch] -= 1# differencedef findTheDifference(self, s, t): diff = 0 for i in range(len(s)): diff -= ord(s[i]) diff += ord(t[i]) diff += ord(t[-1]) return chr(diff)# xordef findTheDifference(self, s, t): code = 0 for ch in s+t: code ^= ord(ch) return chr(code)

entry.title: 748. Shorest Completing Word-HT-8
entry.content: 问题描述找到最短的且含有模板中所有字母的单词。 解法12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728// Javapublic String shortestCompletingWord(String licensePlate, String[] words){ String target = licensePlate.toLowerCase(); int[] charMap = new int[26]; for(int i = 0; i < target.length(); i++) if(Character.isLetter(target.charAt(i))) charMap[target.charAt(i)-'a']++; int minLength = Integer.MAX_VALUE; String result = null; for(int i = 0; i < words.length; i++){ String word = words[i].toLowerCase(); if(matches(word, charMap) && word.length() < minLength){ minLength = word.length(); result = words[i]; } } return result;}private boolean matches(String word, int[] charMap){ int[] targetMap = nre int[26]; for(int i = 0; i < word.length(); i++) if(Character.isLetter(word.charAt(i))) targetMap[word.charAt(i)-'a']++; for(int i = 0; i < 26; i++) if(charMap[i]!=0 && target<ap[i] < charMap[i]) return false; return true;} 123456789101112131415161718192021// C++string shortestCompletingWord(string s, vector<string>& words){ std::transform(s.begin(), s.end(), s.begin(), ::tolower); map<char, int> counts; int total = 0; for(char c: s) if(isalpha(c)){ counts[c]++; total++; } string res; for(string w: words){ int n = total; map<char, int> cnts = counts; for(int i = 0; i < w.size(); i++) n -= (cnts[w[i]]--) > 0; if(n==0 && (res.empty() || w.size() < res.size())) res = w; } return res;}

entry.title: 136. Single Number-HT-7
entry.content: 问题描述给一个非空的整数数组，除了一个元素出现了一次之外每个元素都出现了两次。找出那个只出现一次的元素。 方法一：List operation12345678def singleNumber(self, nums): no_duplicate_list = [] for i in nums: if i not in no_duplicate_list: no_duplicate_list.append(i) else: no_duplicate_list.remove(i) return no_duplicate_list.pop() time: $O(n^2)$ space: $O(n)$ 方法二：Hash Table12345678def singleNumber(self, nums): hash_table = [] for i in nums: try: hash_table.pop(i) except: hash_table[i] = 1 return hash_table.popitem()[0] time: $O(n)$ space: $O(n)$ 方法三：数学$$2 \times (a+b+c) - (a+a+b+b+c) = c$$ 12def singleNUmber(self, nums): return 2*sum(set(nums)) - sum(nums) time: $O(n+n)=O(n)$, see it as sum(list(i for i in nums) space: $O(n+n)=O(n)$ 方法四：位操作12345def singleNumber(self, nums): a = 0 for i in nums: a ^= i return a time: $O(n)$ space: $O(1)$

entry.title: 575. Distribute Candies-HT-6
entry.content: 问题描述给一个长度为偶数的整数数组，不同的数字代表不同类型的糖果。将糖果均分给哥哥姐姐，问姐姐可以得到的糖果种类总数最大是多少？ 方法一：暴力生成糖果的所有排列，然后确定前半个数组中的种类个数。123456789101112131415161718192021222324// Javaint max_kind = 0;public int distributeCandies(int[] nums){ permute(nums, 0); return max_kind;}public void permute(int[] nums, int l){ if(l == nums.length-1){ HashSet<Integer> set = new HashSet<>(); for(int i = 0; i < nums.length/2; i++) set.add(nums[i]); max_kind = Math.max(max_kind, set.size()); } for(int i = l; i < nums.length; i++){ swap(nums, i, l); permute(nums, l+1); swap(nums, i, l); }}public void swap(int[] nums, int x, int y){ int temp = nums[x]; nums[x] = nums[y]; nums[y] = temp;} time: $O(n!)$ space: $O(n)$ 方法二：更好的暴力观察到姐姐最多可以拿到的种类数是 n/2，对于种类数少于 n/2 的情况，我们可以把所有种类数的糖果都给姐姐。所以我们遍历数组，找出糖果的种类总数。 12345678910111213// Javapublic int distributeCandies(int[] candies){ int count = 0; for(int i = 0; i < candies.length && count < candies.length/2; i++){ if(candies[i] != Integer.MIN_VALUE){ count++; for(int j = i+1; j < candies.length; j++) if(candies[j] == candies[i]) candies[j] == Integer.MIN_VALUE;
